src/components/NewOrder.tsx:          });

src/components/NewOrder.tsx:      } else {

src/components/NewOrder.tsx:        if (result.error !== 'No active courier supports fraud check') {
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:          toast.error(`Courier Error: ${result.error}`);
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:        }
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:      }
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:    } catch (error) {

src/components/NewOrder.tsx:      toast.error("Network error while checking courier history");

src/components/NewOrder.tsx:      setIsFetchingHistory(false);
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:    }
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:  };
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:  const calculateTotals = (items: any[], deliveryCharge: number, discount: number, paidAmount: number) => {
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:    const subtotal = items.reduce((acc, item) => acc + (item.quantity * item.price), 0);
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:    const totalAmount = subtotal + deliveryCharge - discount;
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:    const dueAmount = totalAmount - paidAmount;
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:    return { subtotal, totalAmount, dueAmount };
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:  };
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {

src/components/NewOrder.tsx:    if (!auth.currentUser) return;
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:

src/components/NewOrder.tsx:    if (validItems.length === 0) {
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:      toast.error("Please add at least one item with a valid quantity.");
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:      return;
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:    }

src/components/NewOrder.tsx:      toast.error("Please select a warehouse.");
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:      return;
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:    }

src/components/NewOrder.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/components/NewOrder.tsx:    try {

src/components/NewOrder.tsx:

src/components/Suppliers.tsx:  const handlePaymentSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:    if (!selectedSupplierForLedger || !auth.currentUser) return;
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:

src/components/Suppliers.tsx:    if (isNaN(amount) || amount <= 0) {

src/components/Suppliers.tsx:      return;
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:    }
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:

src/components/Suppliers.tsx:    }
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:    try {
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:      await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => {
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        // 1. READ: Get Account Balance first
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        const accountRef = doc(db, 'accounts', paymentForm.accountId);
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        const accountSnap = await transaction.get(accountRef);
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        if (!accountSnap.exists()) throw new Error('Account not found');
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        const currentBalance = accountSnap.data().balance || 0;
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        // 2. WRITE: Create Supplier Payment record
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        const paymentRef = doc(collection(db, 'supplierPayments'));
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        transaction.set(paymentRef, {
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:          supplierId: selectedSupplierForLedger.id,
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:          supplierName: selectedSupplierForLedger.name,
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:          date: paymentForm.date,
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:          amount: amount,

src/components/Suppliers.tsx:          remark: paymentForm.remark,
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:          uid: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:          createdAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        });
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        // 3. WRITE: Create Transaction record (Expense)
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        const txnRef = doc(collection(db, 'transactions'));
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        transaction.set(txnRef, {
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:          type: 'expense',
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:          category: 'COGS',
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:          subCategory: 'Product Cost',
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:          amount: amount,
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:          method: accounts.find(a => a.id === paymentForm.accountId)?.name || 'N/A',

src/components/Suppliers.tsx:          createdAt: serverTimestamp(),

src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        });
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        // 4. WRITE: Update Account Balance
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        transaction.update(accountRef, {
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:          balance: currentBalance - amount,
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:          updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:        });
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:      });

src/components/Suppliers.tsx:
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:  const getSupplierBalance = (supplierId: string) => {
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:    const totalReceived = purchaseOrders
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:      .filter(po => po.supplierId === supplierId && po.status === 'received')

src/components/Suppliers.tsx:    const totalPaid = supplierPayments
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:      .filter(p => p.supplierId === supplierId)

src/components/Suppliers.tsx:    
src/components/Suppliers.tsx:    return totalReceived - totalPaid;

src/components/Returns.tsx:interface RMARequest {

src/components/Returns.tsx:  orderId: string;

src/components/Returns.tsx:export default function Returns() {
src/components/Returns.tsx:  const [requests, setRequests] = useState<RMARequest[]>([]);
src/components/Returns.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

src/components/Returns.tsx:  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
src/components/Returns.tsx:  const [form, setForm] = useState({
src/components/Returns.tsx:    orderId: '',
src/components/Returns.tsx:    reason: '',
src/components/Returns.tsx:    items: [] as any[],
src/components/Returns.tsx:    refundAmount: 0
src/components/Returns.tsx:  });
src/components/Returns.tsx:
src/components/Returns.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/Returns.tsx:    if (!auth.currentUser) return;
src/components/Returns.tsx:    const q = query(collection(db, 'rma_requests'), orderBy('createdAt', 'desc'));
src/components/Returns.tsx:    const unsubscribe = onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
src/components/Returns.tsx:      setRequests(snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() })) as RMARequest[]);
src/components/Returns.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/components/Returns.tsx:    }, (error) => {
src/components/Returns.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.LIST, 'rma_requests');
src/components/Returns.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/components/Returns.tsx:    });
src/components/Returns.tsx:    return unsubscribe;
src/components/Returns.tsx:  }, []);
src/components/Returns.tsx:
src/components/Returns.tsx:  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/components/Returns.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/components/Returns.tsx:    if (!auth.currentUser) return;
src/components/Returns.tsx:    setSubmitting(true);
src/components/Returns.tsx:
src/components/Returns.tsx:    try {
src/components/Returns.tsx:      // Verify order exists
src/components/Returns.tsx:      const orderRef = doc(db, 'orders', form.orderId);
src/components/Returns.tsx:      const orderSnap = await getDoc(orderRef);
src/components/Returns.tsx:      if (!orderSnap.exists()) {
src/components/Returns.tsx:        toast.error("Order ID not found");
src/components/Returns.tsx:        return;
src/components/Returns.tsx:      }
src/components/Returns.tsx:
src/components/Returns.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'rma_requests'), {
src/components/Returns.tsx:        ...form,
src/components/Returns.tsx:        status: 'pending',
src/components/Returns.tsx:        uid: auth.currentUser.uid,
src/components/Returns.tsx:        createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Returns.tsx:        updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/Returns.tsx:      });
src/components/Returns.tsx:
src/components/Returns.tsx:      toast.success("RMA request submitted successfully");
src/components/Returns.tsx:      setIsModalOpen(false);
src/components/Returns.tsx:      setForm({ orderId: '', reason: '', items: [], refundAmount: 0 });
src/components/Returns.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/Returns.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.CREATE, 'rma_requests');
src/components/Returns.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/Returns.tsx:      setSubmitting(false);
src/components/Returns.tsx:    }
src/components/Returns.tsx:  };
src/components/Returns.tsx:
src/components/Returns.tsx:  const handleUpdateStatus = async (requestId: string, newStatus: string) => {
src/components/Returns.tsx:    try {
src/components/Returns.tsx:      await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => {
src/components/Returns.tsx:        const requestRef = doc(db, 'rma_requests', requestId);
src/components/Returns.tsx:        const requestSnap = await transaction.get(requestRef);
src/components/Returns.tsx:        if (!requestSnap.exists()) return;
src/components/Returns.tsx:        const requestData = requestSnap.data() as RMARequest;
src/components/Returns.tsx:
src/components/Returns.tsx:        transaction.update(requestRef, { 
src/components/Returns.tsx:          status: newStatus, 
src/components/Returns.tsx:          updatedAt: serverTimestamp() 
src/components/Returns.tsx:        });
src/components/Returns.tsx:
src/components/Returns.tsx:        // If received, update inventory
src/components/Returns.tsx:        if (newStatus === 'received') {
src/components/Returns.tsx:          for (const item of requestData.items) {
src/components/Returns.tsx:            const invQuery = query(
src/components/Returns.tsx:              collection(db, 'inventory'),
src/components/Returns.tsx:              where('productId', '==', item.productId),
src/components/Returns.tsx:              where('variantId', '==', item.variantId || null)
src/components/Returns.tsx:            );
src/components/Returns.tsx:            const invSnap = await getDocs(invQuery); // getDocs inside transaction is fine for simple queries if not strictly consistent, but better to get refs first
src/components/Returns.tsx:            if (!invSnap.empty) {
src/components/Returns.tsx:              const invDoc = invSnap.docs[0];
src/components/Returns.tsx:              const currentQty = invDoc.data().quantity || 0;
src/components/Returns.tsx:              transaction.update(invDoc.ref, {
src/components/Returns.tsx:                quantity: currentQty + item.quantity,
src/components/Returns.tsx:                lastStockUpdate: serverTimestamp()
src/components/Returns.tsx:              });
src/components/Returns.tsx:            }
src/components/Returns.tsx:          }
src/components/Returns.tsx:        }
src/components/Returns.tsx:
src/components/Returns.tsx:        // If refunded, create transaction
src/components/Returns.tsx:        if (newStatus === 'refunded') {
src/components/Returns.tsx:          // Try to find the original order to get the account
src/components/Returns.tsx:          let accountId = '';
src/components/Returns.tsx:          let method = 'Cash';
src/components/Returns.tsx:          if (requestData.orderId) {
src/components/Returns.tsx:            const ordersQuery = query(collection(db, 'orders'), where('orderNumber', '==', requestData.orderId));
src/components/Returns.tsx:            const ordersSnap = await getDocs(ordersQuery);
src/components/Returns.tsx:            if (!ordersSnap.empty) {
src/components/Returns.tsx:              const orderData = ordersSnap.docs[0].data();
src/components/Returns.tsx:              if (orderData.paymentMethod) {
src/components/Returns.tsx:                method = orderData.paymentMethod;
src/components/Returns.tsx:                const accountsQuery = query(collection(db, 'accounts'), where('name', '==', method));
src/components/Returns.tsx:                const accountsSnap = await getDocs(accountsQuery);
src/components/Returns.tsx:                if (!accountsSnap.empty) {
src/components/Returns.tsx:                  accountId = accountsSnap.docs[0].id;
src/components/Returns.tsx:                }
src/components/Returns.tsx:              }
src/components/Returns.tsx:            }
src/components/Returns.tsx:          }
src/components/Returns.tsx:          
src/components/Returns.tsx:          if (!accountId) {
src/components/Returns.tsx:            const allAccountsSnap = await getDocs(query(collection(db, 'accounts'), limit(1)));
src/components/Returns.tsx:            if (!allAccountsSnap.empty) {
src/components/Returns.tsx:              accountId = allAccountsSnap.docs[0].id;
src/components/Returns.tsx:            }
src/components/Returns.tsx:          }
src/components/Returns.tsx:
src/components/Returns.tsx:          const transRef = doc(collection(db, 'transactions'));
src/components/Returns.tsx:          transaction.set(transRef, {
src/components/Returns.tsx:            type: 'expense',
src/components/Returns.tsx:            category: 'Refund',
src/components/Returns.tsx:            amount: requestData.refundAmount,
src/components/Returns.tsx:            description: `Refund for RMA #${requestId} (Order #${requestData.orderId})`,
src/components/Returns.tsx:            date: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Returns.tsx:            method: method,
src/components/Returns.tsx:            accountId: accountId,
src/components/Returns.tsx:            uid: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/components/Returns.tsx:            createdAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/Returns.tsx:          });
src/components/Returns.tsx:
src/components/Returns.tsx:          if (accountId) {
src/components/Returns.tsx:            const accountRef = doc(db, 'accounts', accountId);

src/components/HR.tsx:    if (!auth.currentUser) return;

src/components/HR.tsx:
src/components/HR.tsx:  // Attendance Actions
src/components/HR.tsx:  const handleBulkAttendance = async () => {
src/components/HR.tsx:    if (!auth.currentUser) return;
src/components/HR.tsx:    try {
src/components/HR.tsx:      const batch = writeBatch(db);
src/components/HR.tsx:      for (const employee of employees) {
src/components/HR.tsx:        const status = attendanceMarks[employee.id] || 'Present';
src/components/HR.tsx:        const attendanceId = `${employee.id}_${attendanceDate}`;
src/components/HR.tsx:        const ref = doc(db, 'attendance', attendanceId);
src/components/HR.tsx:        batch.set(ref, {
src/components/HR.tsx:          employeeId: employee.id,
src/components/HR.tsx:          employeeName: employee.name,
src/components/HR.tsx:          date: attendanceDate,
src/components/HR.tsx:          status,
src/components/HR.tsx:          uid: auth.currentUser.uid,
src/components/HR.tsx:          createdAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/HR.tsx:        });
src/components/HR.tsx:      }
src/components/HR.tsx:      await batch.commit();
src/components/HR.tsx:      toast.success('Attendance marked for all employees');
src/components/HR.tsx:      setIsAttendanceModalOpen(false);
src/components/HR.tsx:    } catch (error) {

src/components/HR.tsx:  const handleAdvanceSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/components/HR.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/components/HR.tsx:    if (!auth.currentUser) return;
src/components/HR.tsx:    try {
src/components/HR.tsx:      const employee = employees.find(emp => emp.id === advanceForm.employeeId);
src/components/HR.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'salaryAdvances'), {
src/components/HR.tsx:        ...advanceForm,
src/components/HR.tsx:        employeeName: employee?.name || '',
src/components/HR.tsx:        amount: Number(advanceForm.amount),
src/components/HR.tsx:        status: 'Pending',
src/components/HR.tsx:        uid: auth.currentUser.uid,
src/components/HR.tsx:        createdAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/HR.tsx:      });
src/components/HR.tsx:      toast.success('Salary advance recorded');
src/components/HR.tsx:      setIsAdvanceModalOpen(false);
src/components/HR.tsx:      setAdvanceForm({ employeeId: '', amount: '', date: format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), note: '' });
src/components/HR.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/HR.tsx:      toast.error('Error saving advance');
src/components/HR.tsx:    }
src/components/HR.tsx:  };
src/components/HR.tsx:
src/components/HR.tsx:  // Salary Generation
src/components/HR.tsx:  const generateSalary = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/components/HR.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/components/HR.tsx:    if (!auth.currentUser) return;
src/components/HR.tsx:    try {
src/components/HR.tsx:      const employee = employees.find(emp => emp.id === salaryForm.employeeId);
src/components/HR.tsx:      if (!employee) return;
src/components/HR.tsx:
src/components/HR.tsx:      // Calculate deductions from attendance
src/components/HR.tsx:      const monthStart = startOfMonth(new Date(salaryForm.month));
src/components/HR.tsx:      const monthEnd = endOfMonth(new Date(salaryForm.month));
src/components/HR.tsx:      
src/components/HR.tsx:      const monthAttendance = attendance.filter(a => 
src/components/HR.tsx:        a.employeeId === employee.id && 
src/components/HR.tsx:        new Date(a.date) >= monthStart && 
src/components/HR.tsx:        new Date(a.date) <= monthEnd
src/components/HR.tsx:      );
src/components/HR.tsx:
src/components/HR.tsx:      const absentCount = monthAttendance.filter(a => a.status === 'Absent').length;
src/components/HR.tsx:      const lateCount = monthAttendance.filter(a => a.status === 'Late').length;
src/components/HR.tsx:      
src/components/HR.tsx:      // Simple deduction logic: 1 day salary for each absent, 0.25 day salary for each late
src/components/HR.tsx:      const dailySalary = employee.baseSalary / 30;
src/components/HR.tsx:      const deductions = (absentCount * dailySalary) + (lateCount * dailySalary * 0.25);
src/components/HR.tsx:
src/components/HR.tsx:      // Calculate advance deductions
src/components/HR.tsx:      const pendingAdvances = salaryAdvances.filter(adv => 
src/components/HR.tsx:        adv.employeeId === employee.id && adv.status === 'Pending'
src/components/HR.tsx:      );
src/components/HR.tsx:      const totalAdvance = pendingAdvances.reduce((sum, adv) => sum + adv.amount, 0);
src/components/HR.tsx:
src/components/HR.tsx:      const bonus = Number(salaryForm.bonus);
src/components/HR.tsx:      const netSalary = employee.baseSalary - deductions - totalAdvance + bonus;
src/components/HR.tsx:
src/components/HR.tsx:      await addDoc(collection(db, 'salaryRecords'), {
src/components/HR.tsx:        employeeId: employee.id,
src/components/HR.tsx:        employeeName: employee.name,
src/components/HR.tsx:        month: salaryForm.month,
src/components/HR.tsx:        baseSalary: employee.baseSalary,
src/components/HR.tsx:        deductions: Math.round(deductions),
src/components/HR.tsx:        advanceDeduction: totalAdvance,
src/components/HR.tsx:        bonus,
src/components/HR.tsx:        netSalary: Math.round(netSalary),
src/components/HR.tsx:        status: 'Paid',
src/components/HR.tsx:        paidAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/HR.tsx:        uid: auth.currentUser.uid,
src/components/HR.tsx:        createdAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/HR.tsx:      });
src/components/HR.tsx:
src/components/HR.tsx:      // Mark advances as deducted
src/components/HR.tsx:      const batch = writeBatch(db);
src/components/HR.tsx:      pendingAdvances.forEach(adv => {
src/components/HR.tsx:        batch.update(doc(db, 'salaryAdvances', adv.id), { status: 'Deducted' });
src/components/HR.tsx:      });
src/components/HR.tsx:      await batch.commit();
src/components/HR.tsx:
src/components/HR.tsx:      toast.success('Salary generated successfully');
src/components/HR.tsx:      setIsSalaryModalOpen(false);
src/components/HR.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/HR.tsx:      toast.error('Error generating salary');
src/components/HR.tsx:    }
src/components/HR.tsx:  };
src/components/HR.tsx:
src/components/HR.tsx:  const filteredEmployees = employees.filter(emp => 
src/components/HR.tsx:    emp.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||

src/components/HR.tsx:      {/* Header */}
src/components/HR.tsx:      <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-4">
src/components/HR.tsx:        <div>

src/components/HR.tsx:          {activeTab === 'employees' && (

src/components/Orders.tsx:            });
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:            const batch = writeBatch(db);

src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:            for (const order of mappedWooOrders) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:              if (!order.customerPhone) continue;
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:              const existing = existingCustomers.get(order.customerPhone);
src/components/Orders.tsx:              const wooOrderId = String(order.wooId);
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:              if (!existing) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                // Create new customer
src/components/Orders.tsx:                const newCustomerRef = doc(collection(db, "customers"));
src/components/Orders.tsx:                const newCustomer = {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  name: order.customerName || "Unknown",
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  phone: order.customerPhone,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  email: order.customerEmail || "",
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  address: order.customerAddress || "",

src/components/Orders.tsx:                  totalSpent: order.totalAmount || 0,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  lastOrderDate: order.createdAt?.toDate
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    ? order.createdAt.toDate()
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    : new Date(),

src/components/Orders.tsx:                  createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  updatedAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:                };
src/components/Orders.tsx:                batch.set(newCustomerRef, newCustomer);
src/components/Orders.tsx:                existingCustomers.set(order.customerPhone, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  id: newCustomerRef.id,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  ...newCustomer,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                });
src/components/Orders.tsx:                batchCount++;
src/components/Orders.tsx:              } else {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                // Update existing customer if this order hasn't been counted

src/components/Orders.tsx:                    orderCount: (existing.orderCount || 0) + 1,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    totalSpent:
src/components/Orders.tsx:                      (existing.totalSpent || 0) + (order.totalAmount || 0),
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    lastOrderDate: order.createdAt?.toDate

src/components/Orders.tsx:                      : new Date(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    wooOrderIds: arrayUnion(wooOrderId),
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    updatedAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  });
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  existing.wooOrderIds = [...wooOrderIds, wooOrderId];
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  existing.orderCount = (existing.orderCount || 0) + 1;
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  existing.totalSpent =
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    (existing.totalSpent || 0) + (order.totalAmount || 0);
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  batchCount++;
src/components/Orders.tsx:                }
src/components/Orders.tsx:              }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:              if (batchCount >= 450) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                await batch.commit();
src/components/Orders.tsx:                batchCount = 0;
src/components/Orders.tsx:              }
src/components/Orders.tsx:            }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:            if (batchCount > 0) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:              await batch.commit();
src/components/Orders.tsx:            }
src/components/Orders.tsx:          } catch (syncError) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            console.error("Error syncing woo customers:", syncError);
src/components/Orders.tsx:          }

src/components/Orders.tsx:          }
src/components/Orders.tsx:        }

src/components/Orders.tsx:        ?.includes("json")

src/components/Orders.tsx:    } catch (error) {

src/components/Orders.tsx:      toast.error("Network error while checking courier history");

src/components/Orders.tsx:    }

src/components/Orders.tsx:    setZones([]);
src/components/Orders.tsx:    setAreas([]);

src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:  const calculateTotals = (
src/components/Orders.tsx:    items: any[],
src/components/Orders.tsx:    deliveryCharge: number,
src/components/Orders.tsx:    discount: number,
src/components/Orders.tsx:    paidAmount: number,
src/components/Orders.tsx:  ) => {
src/components/Orders.tsx:    const subtotal = items.reduce(
src/components/Orders.tsx:      (acc, item) => acc + item.quantity * item.price,
src/components/Orders.tsx:      0,
src/components/Orders.tsx:    );
src/components/Orders.tsx:    const totalAmount = subtotal + deliveryCharge - discount;
src/components/Orders.tsx:    const dueAmount = totalAmount - paidAmount;
src/components/Orders.tsx:    return { subtotal, totalAmount, dueAmount };
src/components/Orders.tsx:  };
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/components/Orders.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/components/Orders.tsx:    if (!auth.currentUser) return;
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:    try {
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const { subtotal, totalAmount, dueAmount } = calculateTotals(
src/components/Orders.tsx:        orderForm.items,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        orderForm.deliveryCharge,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        orderForm.discount,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        orderForm.paidAmount,
src/components/Orders.tsx:      );
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      // Duplicate Detection Check (Only for new orders)
src/components/Orders.tsx:      if (!editingOrder) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const duplicate = await checkDuplicateOrder({
src/components/Orders.tsx:          customerPhone: orderForm.customerPhone,
src/components/Orders.tsx:          customerName: orderForm.customerName,
src/components/Orders.tsx:          items: orderForm.items,
src/components/Orders.tsx:          totalAmount: totalAmount,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        });
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:        if (duplicate) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          setConfirmConfig({
src/components/Orders.tsx:            isOpen: true,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            title: "Duplicate Order Detected",
src/components/Orders.tsx:            message: `An order (#${duplicate.orderNumber || duplicate.id.slice(0, 8)}) with the same phone number, products, and total value was found within the last 24 hours. Are you sure you want to create this duplicate order?`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            variant: "warning",
src/components/Orders.tsx:            onConfirm: () => proceedWithSubmit(totalAmount),
src/components/Orders.tsx:          });
src/components/Orders.tsx:          return;
src/components/Orders.tsx:        }
src/components/Orders.tsx:      }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      await proceedWithSubmit(totalAmount);
src/components/Orders.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(
src/components/Orders.tsx:        error,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        editingOrder ? OperationType.UPDATE : OperationType.CREATE,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        "orders",
src/components/Orders.tsx:      );
src/components/Orders.tsx:    }
src/components/Orders.tsx:  };
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:  const proceedWithSubmit = async (totalAmount: number) => {
src/components/Orders.tsx:    if (!auth.currentUser) return;
src/components/Orders.tsx:    try {
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const { subtotal, dueAmount } = calculateTotals(
src/components/Orders.tsx:        orderForm.items,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        orderForm.deliveryCharge,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        orderForm.discount,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        orderForm.paidAmount,
src/components/Orders.tsx:      );

src/components/Orders.tsx:        user: auth.currentUser.email,

src/components/Orders.tsx:        timestamp: Timestamp.now(),

src/components/Orders.tsx:      };

src/components/Orders.tsx:        ...orderForm,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        subtotal,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        totalAmount,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        dueAmount,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        logs: editingOrder
src/components/Orders.tsx:          ? [...(editingOrder.logs || []), logEntry]
src/components/Orders.tsx:          : [logEntry],
src/components/Orders.tsx:        updatedAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:      };
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      // 1. PRE-TRANSACTION READS
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const customerQuery = query(
src/components/Orders.tsx:        collection(db, "customers"),
src/components/Orders.tsx:        where("phone", "==", orderForm.customerPhone),
src/components/Orders.tsx:      );
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const customerSnap = await getDocs(customerQuery);
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const inventorySnaps: { item: any; snap: any }[] = [];
src/components/Orders.tsx:      if (
src/components/Orders.tsx:        !editingOrder &&
src/components/Orders.tsx:        orderForm.status !== "cancelled" &&
src/components/Orders.tsx:        orderForm.status !== "returned"
src/components/Orders.tsx:      ) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        for (const item of orderForm.items) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          const invQuery = query(
src/components/Orders.tsx:            collection(db, "inventory"),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            where("productId", "==", item.productId),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            where("variantId", "==", item.variantId || ""),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            where("warehouseId", "==", orderForm.warehouseId),
src/components/Orders.tsx:          );
src/components/Orders.tsx:          const invSnap = await getDocs(invQuery);
src/components/Orders.tsx:          inventorySnaps.push({ item, snap: invSnap });
src/components/Orders.tsx:        }
src/components/Orders.tsx:      }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        // 2. TRANSACTION READS
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const settingsRef = doc(db, "settings", "company");
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const settingsSnap = await transaction.get(settingsRef);
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:        // 3. ALL WRITES SECOND
src/components/Orders.tsx:        let customerId = "";
src/components/Orders.tsx:        if (customerSnap.empty) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          const customerRef = doc(collection(db, "customers"));
src/components/Orders.tsx:          transaction.set(customerRef, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            name: orderForm.customerName,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            phone: orderForm.customerPhone,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            address: orderForm.customerAddress,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            orderCount: 1,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            totalSpent: totalAmount,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            lastOrderDate: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            uid: auth.currentUser!.uid,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:          });
src/components/Orders.tsx:          customerId = customerRef.id;
src/components/Orders.tsx:        } else {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          const customerDoc = customerSnap.docs[0];
src/components/Orders.tsx:          customerId = customerDoc.id;
src/components/Orders.tsx:          transaction.update(customerDoc.ref, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            orderCount:
src/components/Orders.tsx:              (customerDoc.data().orderCount || 0) + (editingOrder ? 0 : 1),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            totalSpent:
src/components/Orders.tsx:              (customerDoc.data().totalSpent || 0) +
src/components/Orders.tsx:              (editingOrder ? 0 : totalAmount),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            lastOrderDate: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:          });
src/components/Orders.tsx:        }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const finalData = { ...data, customerId };
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:        if (editingOrder) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          transaction.update(doc(db, "orders", editingOrder.id), finalData);
src/components/Orders.tsx:        } else {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          let nextOrderNumber = 1001;
src/components/Orders.tsx:          if (settingsSnap.exists() && settingsSnap.data().orderCounter) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            nextOrderNumber = settingsSnap.data().orderCounter + 1;
src/components/Orders.tsx:          }
src/components/Orders.tsx:          transaction.set(
src/components/Orders.tsx:            settingsRef,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            { orderCounter: nextOrderNumber },
src/components/Orders.tsx:            { merge: true },
src/components/Orders.tsx:          );
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:          const orderRef = doc(collection(db, "orders"));
src/components/Orders.tsx:          transaction.set(orderRef, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            ...finalData,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            orderNumber: nextOrderNumber,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            uid: auth.currentUser!.uid,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:          });
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:          // Add to Finance if paidAmount > 0
src/components/Orders.tsx:          if (finalData.paidAmount > 0) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            let accountId = "";
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:            // To find account safely, just do getDocs directly
src/components/Orders.tsx:            const accountsQuery = query(
src/components/Orders.tsx:              collection(db, "accounts"),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              where("name", "==", finalData.paymentMethod),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            );

src/components/Orders.tsx:            if (!accountsSnap.empty) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:              accountId = accountsSnap.docs[0].id;
src/components/Orders.tsx:            } else {
src/components/Orders.tsx:              const allAccountsSnap = await getDocs(
src/components/Orders.tsx:                query(collection(db, "accounts"), limit(1)),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              );
src/components/Orders.tsx:              if (!allAccountsSnap.empty) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                accountId = allAccountsSnap.docs[0].id;
src/components/Orders.tsx:              }
src/components/Orders.tsx:            }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:            const transactionRef = doc(collection(db, "transactions"));
src/components/Orders.tsx:            transaction.set(transactionRef, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:              type: "income",
src/components/Orders.tsx:              category: "Sales",
src/components/Orders.tsx:              amount: finalData.paidAmount,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              description: `Order #${nextOrderNumber} Payment`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              date: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              method: finalData.paymentMethod,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              accountId: accountId,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              orderId: orderRef.id,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              orderNumber: nextOrderNumber,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              uid: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            });
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:            if (accountId) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:              const accountRef = doc(db, "accounts", accountId);
src/components/Orders.tsx:              const accountSnap = await transaction.get(accountRef);
src/components/Orders.tsx:              if (accountSnap.exists()) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                const currentBalance = accountSnap.data().balance || 0;
src/components/Orders.tsx:                transaction.update(accountRef, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  balance: currentBalance + finalData.paidAmount,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  updatedAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:                });
src/components/Orders.tsx:              }
src/components/Orders.tsx:            }
src/components/Orders.tsx:          }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:          // Deduct Inventory
src/components/Orders.tsx:          for (const invData of inventorySnaps) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            const { item, snap } = invData;
src/components/Orders.tsx:            if (!snap.empty) {

src/components/Orders.tsx:              const newQty = currentQty - item.quantity;
src/components/Orders.tsx:              transaction.update(invDoc.ref, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                quantity: newQty,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                updatedAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              });
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:              // Log
src/components/Orders.tsx:              const logRef = doc(collection(db, "inventoryLogs"));
src/components/Orders.tsx:              transaction.set(logRef, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                productId: item.productId,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                variantId: item.variantId || "",
src/components/Orders.tsx:                warehouseId: orderForm.warehouseId,

src/components/Orders.tsx:                quantityChange: -item.quantity,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                newQuantity: newQty,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                reason: `Order #${nextOrderNumber}`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                uid: auth.currentUser!.uid,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              });
src/components/Orders.tsx:            }
src/components/Orders.tsx:          }
src/components/Orders.tsx:        }
src/components/Orders.tsx:      });
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      await logActivity(

src/components/Orders.tsx:  };
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:  const handleUpdateStatus = async (orderId: string, newStatus: string) => {
src/components/Orders.tsx:    if (!auth.currentUser) return;
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:    // Handle WooCommerce orders
src/components/Orders.tsx:    if (orderId.startsWith("woo_")) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const wooId = orderId.replace("woo_", "");
src/components/Orders.tsx:      setLoading(true);
src/components/Orders.tsx:      try {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const response = await fetch(`/api/woocommerce/orders/${wooId}`, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          method: "PUT",
src/components/Orders.tsx:          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
src/components/Orders.tsx:          body: JSON.stringify({ status: newStatus }),
src/components/Orders.tsx:        });
src/components/Orders.tsx:        if (response.ok) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          toast.success(`WooCommerce order status updated to ${newStatus}`);
src/components/Orders.tsx:          // Refresh WooCommerce orders
src/components/Orders.tsx:          const wooResponse = await fetch(
src/components/Orders.tsx:            "/api/woocommerce/orders?per_page=50",
src/components/Orders.tsx:          );
src/components/Orders.tsx:          if (wooResponse.ok) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            const data = await (wooResponse.headers
src/components/Orders.tsx:              .get("content-type")
src/components/Orders.tsx:              ?.includes("json")
src/components/Orders.tsx:              ? wooResponse.json()
src/components/Orders.tsx:              : Promise.reject(
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  new Error("Invalid non-JSON response from server."),
src/components/Orders.tsx:                ));
src/components/Orders.tsx:            const mappedWooOrders = (data.orders || []).map((order: any) => ({
src/components/Orders.tsx:              id: `woo_${order.id}`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              wooId: order.id,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              source: "woocommerce",
src/components/Orders.tsx:              orderNumber: order.number,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              customerName: `${order.billing.first_name} ${order.billing.last_name}`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              customerPhone: order.billing.phone,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              customerAddress: `${order.billing.address_1}, ${order.billing.city}`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              totalAmount: parseFloat(order.total),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              dueAmount: parseFloat(order.total),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              status: order.status,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              createdAt: { toDate: () => new Date(order.date_created) },
src/components/Orders.tsx:              items: order.line_items.map((item: any) => ({
src/components/Orders.tsx:                name: item.name,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                quantity: item.quantity,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                price: parseFloat(item.price),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              })),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              notes: order.customer_note,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              paymentMethod: order.payment_method_title,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            }));
src/components/Orders.tsx:            setWooOrders(mappedWooOrders);
src/components/Orders.tsx:          }
src/components/Orders.tsx:        } else {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          const err = await (response.headers
src/components/Orders.tsx:            .get("content-type")
src/components/Orders.tsx:            ?.includes("json")
src/components/Orders.tsx:            ? response.json()
src/components/Orders.tsx:            : Promise.reject(
src/components/Orders.tsx:                new Error("Invalid non-JSON response from server."),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              ));
src/components/Orders.tsx:          throw new Error(err.error || "Failed to update WooCommerce order");
src/components/Orders.tsx:        }
src/components/Orders.tsx:      } catch (error: any) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        toast.error(error.message);
src/components/Orders.tsx:      } finally {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        setLoading(false);
src/components/Orders.tsx:      }
src/components/Orders.tsx:      return;
src/components/Orders.tsx:    }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:    try {
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const orderRef = doc(db, "orders", orderId);
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const orderSnap = await transaction.get(orderRef);
src/components/Orders.tsx:        if (!orderSnap.exists()) return;
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const orderData = orderSnap.data();
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const normalizedOldStatus = orderData.status.toLowerCase();
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const normalizedNewStatus = newStatus.toLowerCase();
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:        if (normalizedOldStatus === normalizedNewStatus) return;
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:        // 1. Update Order Status
src/components/Orders.tsx:        transaction.update(orderRef, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          status: newStatus,
src/components/Orders.tsx:          updatedAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:        });
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:        // 2. Stock Management Logic
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const isActiveStatus = (status: string) =>
src/components/Orders.tsx:          status !== "cancelled" && status !== "returned";
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:        // If moving FROM active TO inactive -> Restore Stock
src/components/Orders.tsx:        if (
src/components/Orders.tsx:          isActiveStatus(normalizedOldStatus) &&
src/components/Orders.tsx:          !isActiveStatus(normalizedNewStatus)
src/components/Orders.tsx:        ) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          for (const item of orderData.items) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            const invQuery = query(
src/components/Orders.tsx:              collection(db, "inventory"),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              where("productId", "==", item.productId),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              where("variantId", "==", item.variantId || ""),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              where("warehouseId", "==", orderData.warehouseId),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            );
src/components/Orders.tsx:            const invSnap = await getDocs(invQuery);
src/components/Orders.tsx:            if (!invSnap.empty) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:              const invDoc = invSnap.docs[0];
src/components/Orders.tsx:              const currentQty = invDoc.data().quantity || 0;
src/components/Orders.tsx:              const newQty = currentQty + item.quantity;
src/components/Orders.tsx:              transaction.update(invDoc.ref, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                quantity: newQty,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                updatedAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              });
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:              const logRef = doc(collection(db, "inventoryLogs"));
src/components/Orders.tsx:              transaction.set(logRef, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                productId: item.productId,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                variantId: item.variantId || "",
src/components/Orders.tsx:                warehouseId: orderData.warehouseId,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                type: "in",
src/components/Orders.tsx:                quantityChange: item.quantity,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                newQuantity: newQty,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                reason: `Order #${orderId.slice(0, 8)} ${newStatus} (Stock Restored)`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                uid: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              });
src/components/Orders.tsx:            }
src/components/Orders.tsx:          }
src/components/Orders.tsx:        }
src/components/Orders.tsx:        // If moving FROM inactive TO active -> Deduct Stock
src/components/Orders.tsx:        else if (
src/components/Orders.tsx:          !isActiveStatus(normalizedOldStatus) &&
src/components/Orders.tsx:          isActiveStatus(normalizedNewStatus)
src/components/Orders.tsx:        ) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          for (const item of orderData.items) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            const invQuery = query(
src/components/Orders.tsx:              collection(db, "inventory"),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              where("productId", "==", item.productId),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              where("variantId", "==", item.variantId || ""),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              where("warehouseId", "==", orderData.warehouseId),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            );
src/components/Orders.tsx:            const invSnap = await getDocs(invQuery);
src/components/Orders.tsx:            if (!invSnap.empty) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:              const invDoc = invSnap.docs[0];
src/components/Orders.tsx:              const currentQty = invDoc.data().quantity || 0;
src/components/Orders.tsx:              const newQty = currentQty - item.quantity;
src/components/Orders.tsx:              transaction.update(invDoc.ref, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                quantity: newQty,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                updatedAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              });
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:              const logRef = doc(collection(db, "inventoryLogs"));
src/components/Orders.tsx:              transaction.set(logRef, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                productId: item.productId,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                variantId: item.variantId || "",
src/components/Orders.tsx:                warehouseId: orderData.warehouseId,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                type: "out",
src/components/Orders.tsx:                quantityChange: -item.quantity,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                newQuantity: newQty,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                reason: `Order #${orderId.slice(0, 8)} ${newStatus} (Stock Re-deducted)`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                uid: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              });
src/components/Orders.tsx:            }
src/components/Orders.tsx:          }
src/components/Orders.tsx:        }
src/components/Orders.tsx:      });
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      toast.success(
src/components/Orders.tsx:        `Order status updated to ${newStatus.replace(/_/g, " ").charAt(0).toUpperCase() + newStatus.replace(/_/g, " ").slice(1)}`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:      );
src/components/Orders.tsx:      await logActivity(
src/components/Orders.tsx:        "Updated Order Status",
src/components/Orders.tsx:        "Orders",
src/components/Orders.tsx:        `Order #${orderId.slice(0, 8)} status changed to ${newStatus}`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:      );
src/components/Orders.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.UPDATE, `orders/${orderId}`);
src/components/Orders.tsx:    }
src/components/Orders.tsx:  };
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:  const handleDeleteOrder = async (orderId: string) => {
src/components/Orders.tsx:    setConfirmConfig({
src/components/Orders.tsx:      isOpen: true,
src/components/Orders.tsx:      title: "Delete Order",
src/components/Orders.tsx:      message:
src/components/Orders.tsx:        "Are you sure you want to delete this order? Inventory will be restored if the order is currently active.",
src/components/Orders.tsx:      variant: "danger",
src/components/Orders.tsx:      onConfirm: async () => {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        try {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          const orderRef = doc(db, "orders", orderId);
src/components/Orders.tsx:          await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            const snap = await transaction.get(orderRef);
src/components/Orders.tsx:            if (!snap.exists()) return;
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:            const orderData = snap.data();
src/components/Orders.tsx:            const normalizedStatus = orderData.status?.toLowerCase() || "";
src/components/Orders.tsx:            const isActive =
src/components/Orders.tsx:              normalizedStatus !== "cancelled" &&
src/components/Orders.tsx:              normalizedStatus !== "returned";
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:            // Restore Stock if deleting an active order
src/components/Orders.tsx:            if (isActive && orderData.items) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:              for (const item of orderData.items) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                const invQuery = query(
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  collection(db, "inventory"),
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  where("productId", "==", item.productId),
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  where("variantId", "==", item.variantId || ""),
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  where("warehouseId", "==", orderData.warehouseId),
src/components/Orders.tsx:                );
src/components/Orders.tsx:                const invSnap = await getDocs(invQuery);
src/components/Orders.tsx:                if (!invSnap.empty) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  const invDoc = invSnap.docs[0];
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  const currentQty = invDoc.data().quantity || 0;
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  const newQty = currentQty + (item.quantity || 0);
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  transaction.update(invDoc.ref, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    quantity: newQty,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    updatedAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  });
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  // Log
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  const logRef = doc(collection(db, "inventoryLogs"));
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  transaction.set(logRef, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    productId: item.productId,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    variantId: item.variantId || "",
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    warehouseId: orderData.warehouseId,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    type: "in",
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    quantityChange: item.quantity || 0,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    newQuantity: newQty,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    reason: `Order #${orderId.slice(0, 8)} DELETED (Auto-Restore)`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    uid: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                    createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  });
src/components/Orders.tsx:                }
src/components/Orders.tsx:              }
src/components/Orders.tsx:            }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:            transaction.delete(orderRef);
src/components/Orders.tsx:          });
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:          await logActivity(
src/components/Orders.tsx:            "Deleted Order",
src/components/Orders.tsx:            "Orders",
src/components/Orders.tsx:            `Order #${orderId.slice(0, 8)} removed and stock adjusted`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:          );
src/components/Orders.tsx:          toast.success("Order deleted and stock updated");
src/components/Orders.tsx:        } catch (error) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          handleFirestoreError(
src/components/Orders.tsx:            error,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            OperationType.DELETE,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            `orders/${orderId}`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:          );
src/components/Orders.tsx:        }
src/components/Orders.tsx:      },
src/components/Orders.tsx:    });
src/components/Orders.tsx:  };
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:  const handleBulkStatusUpdate = async (newStatus: string) => {
src/components/Orders.tsx:    if (!auth.currentUser || selectedOrders.length === 0) return;
src/components/Orders.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/components/Orders.tsx:    let successCount = 0;
src/components/Orders.tsx:    let failCount = 0;
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:    try {
src/components/Orders.tsx:      for (const id of selectedOrders) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        try {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          if (id.startsWith("woo_")) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            const wooId = id.replace("woo_", "");
src/components/Orders.tsx:            const response = await fetch(`/api/woocommerce/orders/${wooId}`, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:              method: "PUT",
src/components/Orders.tsx:              headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
src/components/Orders.tsx:              body: JSON.stringify({ status: newStatus }),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            });
src/components/Orders.tsx:            if (response.ok) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:              setWooOrders((prev) =>
src/components/Orders.tsx:                prev.map((o) =>
src/components/Orders.tsx:                  o.id === id ? { ...o, status: newStatus } : o,
src/components/Orders.tsx:                ),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              );
src/components/Orders.tsx:              successCount++;
src/components/Orders.tsx:            } else {
src/components/Orders.tsx:              failCount++;
src/components/Orders.tsx:            }
src/components/Orders.tsx:          } else {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            // Sequential execution for local orders to ensure inventory consistency
src/components/Orders.tsx:            await handleUpdateStatus(id, newStatus);
src/components/Orders.tsx:            successCount++;
src/components/Orders.tsx:          }
src/components/Orders.tsx:        } catch (err) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          console.error(`Failed to update order ${id}:`, err);
src/components/Orders.tsx:          failCount++;
src/components/Orders.tsx:        }
src/components/Orders.tsx:      }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      if (successCount > 0) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        toast.success(`Successfully updated ${successCount} orders`);
src/components/Orders.tsx:      }
src/components/Orders.tsx:      if (failCount > 0) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        toast.error(`Failed to update ${failCount} orders`);
src/components/Orders.tsx:      }
src/components/Orders.tsx:      setSelectedOrders([]);
src/components/Orders.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:      toast.error("An error occurred during bulk update");
src/components/Orders.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/Orders.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/components/Orders.tsx:    }
src/components/Orders.tsx:  };
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:  const handleSendToCourier = async (order: any, courierName?: string) => {
src/components/Orders.tsx:    // Determine which courier to use
src/components/Orders.tsx:    const activeCouriers = Object.entries(courierConfigs).filter(
src/components/Orders.tsx:      ([_, config]: [string, any]) => config.isActive,
src/components/Orders.tsx:    );
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:    if (activeCouriers.length === 0) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:      toast.error(
src/components/Orders.tsx:        "No courier is active. Please go to Settings > Logistics to activate one.",
src/components/Orders.tsx:      );
src/components/Orders.tsx:      return;
src/components/Orders.tsx:    }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:    let targetCourier = courierName;
src/components/Orders.tsx:    if (!targetCourier) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:      if (activeCouriers.length > 1) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        setCourierSelection({
src/components/Orders.tsx:          isOpen: true,
src/components/Orders.tsx:          order,
src/components/Orders.tsx:          activeCouriers,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        });
src/components/Orders.tsx:        return;
src/components/Orders.tsx:      }
src/components/Orders.tsx:      targetCourier = activeCouriers[0][0];
src/components/Orders.tsx:    }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:    if (
src/components/Orders.tsx:      ["shipped", "delivered", "cancelled", "returned"].includes(order.status)
src/components/Orders.tsx:    ) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:      toast.error(
src/components/Orders.tsx:        `Cannot send order with status: ${order.status.replace(/_/g, " ")}`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:      );
src/components/Orders.tsx:      return;
src/components/Orders.tsx:    }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/components/Orders.tsx:    try {
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const sanitizePhone = (phone: string) => {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const cleaned = phone.replace(/\D/g, "");
src/components/Orders.tsx:        return cleaned.length > 11 ? cleaned.slice(-11) : cleaned;
src/components/Orders.tsx:      };
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const phone = sanitizePhone(order.customerPhone);
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      if (targetCourier === "pathao") {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        if (
src/components/Orders.tsx:          !order.pathao_city_id ||
src/components/Orders.tsx:          !order.pathao_zone_id ||
src/components/Orders.tsx:          !order.pathao_area_id
src/components/Orders.tsx:        ) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          toast.error(
src/components/Orders.tsx:            "Please select Pathao City, Zone, and Area first by editing the order.",
src/components/Orders.tsx:          );
src/components/Orders.tsx:          setLoading(false);
src/components/Orders.tsx:          return;
src/components/Orders.tsx:        }
src/components/Orders.tsx:      }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      if (targetCourier === "carrybee") {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        if (
src/components/Orders.tsx:          !order.carrybee_city_id ||
src/components/Orders.tsx:          !order.carrybee_zone_id ||
src/components/Orders.tsx:          !order.carrybee_area_id
src/components/Orders.tsx:        ) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          toast.error(
src/components/Orders.tsx:            "Please select Carrybee City, Zone, and Area first by editing the order.",
src/components/Orders.tsx:          );
src/components/Orders.tsx:          setLoading(false);
src/components/Orders.tsx:          return;
src/components/Orders.tsx:        }
src/components/Orders.tsx:      }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const orderData = {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        invoice: order.orderNumber?.toString() || order.id.slice(0, 8),
src/components/Orders.tsx:        customer_name: order.customerName,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        customer_phone: phone,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        customer_address: order.customerAddress,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        amount: order.totalAmount,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        cod_amount: Math.round(order.dueAmount || 0),
src/components/Orders.tsx:        note: order.notes || "",
src/components/Orders.tsx:        weight: 0.5,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        recipient_city:
src/components/Orders.tsx:          targetCourier === "carrybee"
src/components/Orders.tsx:            ? order.carrybee_city_id
src/components/Orders.tsx:            : order.pathao_city_id,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        recipient_zone:
src/components/Orders.tsx:          targetCourier === "carrybee"
src/components/Orders.tsx:            ? order.carrybee_zone_id
src/components/Orders.tsx:            : order.pathao_zone_id,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        recipient_area:
src/components/Orders.tsx:          targetCourier === "carrybee"
src/components/Orders.tsx:            ? order.carrybee_area_id
src/components/Orders.tsx:            : order.pathao_area_id,
src/components/Orders.tsx:      };
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const response = await fetch("/api/couriers/order", {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        method: "POST",
src/components/Orders.tsx:        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
src/components/Orders.tsx:        body: JSON.stringify({ courier: targetCourier, orderData }),
src/components/Orders.tsx:      });
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const result = await (response.headers
src/components/Orders.tsx:        .get("content-type")
src/components/Orders.tsx:        ?.includes("json")
src/components/Orders.tsx:        ? response.json()
src/components/Orders.tsx:        : Promise.reject(new Error("Invalid non-JSON response from server.")));
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      if (response.ok) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const trackingCode =
src/components/Orders.tsx:          result.consignment?.tracking_code ||
src/components/Orders.tsx:          result.tracking_id ||
src/components/Orders.tsx:          result.tracking_code;
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:        if (order.source === "woocommerce") {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          // Update WooCommerce order status to processing or shipped
src/components/Orders.tsx:          await fetch(`/api/woocommerce/orders/${order.wooId}`, {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            method: "PUT",
src/components/Orders.tsx:            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
src/components/Orders.tsx:            body: JSON.stringify({ status: "processing" }),
src/components/Orders.tsx:          });
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:          // Update local state so UI reflects the change immediately
src/components/Orders.tsx:          setWooOrders((prev) =>
src/components/Orders.tsx:            prev.map((o) =>
src/components/Orders.tsx:              o.id === order.id ? { ...o, status: "processing" } : o,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            ),
src/components/Orders.tsx:          );
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:          // Also save to local deliveries for tracking
src/components/Orders.tsx:          await addDoc(collection(db, "deliveries"), {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            id: trackingCode,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            orderId: order.id,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            wooId: order.wooId,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            courier:
src/components/Orders.tsx:              targetCourier.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + targetCourier.slice(1),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            status: "Pending Pickup",
src/components/Orders.tsx:            location: order.customerZone || "Processing",
src/components/Orders.tsx:            eta: "2-3 Days",
src/components/Orders.tsx:            createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            uid: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/components/Orders.tsx:          });
src/components/Orders.tsx:        } else {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          await updateDoc(doc(db, "orders", order.id), {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            courierName:
src/components/Orders.tsx:              targetCourier.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + targetCourier.slice(1),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            trackingNumber: trackingCode,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            status: "shipped",
src/components/Orders.tsx:            updatedAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            logs: arrayUnion({
src/components/Orders.tsx:              user: auth.currentUser?.email,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              action: `Sent to ${targetCourier}`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:              timestamp: Timestamp.now(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:              details: `Tracking Code: ${trackingCode}`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            }),
src/components/Orders.tsx:          });
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:          await addDoc(collection(db, "deliveries"), {
src/components/Orders.tsx:            id: trackingCode,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            orderId: order.id,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            orderNumber: order.orderNumber,
src/components/Orders.tsx:            courier:
src/components/Orders.tsx:              targetCourier.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + targetCourier.slice(1),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            status: "Pending Pickup",
src/components/Orders.tsx:            location: order.customerZone || "Processing",
src/components/Orders.tsx:            eta: "2-3 Days",
src/components/Orders.tsx:            createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:            uid: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/components/Orders.tsx:          });
src/components/Orders.tsx:        }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:        toast.success(
src/components/Orders.tsx:          `Order sent to ${targetCourier}! Tracking: ${trackingCode}`,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        );
src/components/Orders.tsx:      } else {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        throw new Error(result.error || `Failed to send to ${targetCourier}`);
src/components/Orders.tsx:      }
src/components/Orders.tsx:    } catch (error: any) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:      console.error("Courier error:", error);

src/components/Orders.tsx:  const filteredOrders = useMemo(() => {

src/components/Orders.tsx:      .filter((order) => {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const matchesSearch =
src/components/Orders.tsx:          order.customerName
src/components/Orders.tsx:            ?.toLowerCase()
src/components/Orders.tsx:            .includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
src/components/Orders.tsx:          order.id?.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||

src/components/Orders.tsx:          order.orderNumber?.toString().includes(searchTerm);

src/components/Orders.tsx:        const matchesTab = activeTab === "All" || order.status === activeTab;
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const date = order.createdAt?.toDate
src/components/Orders.tsx:          ? order.createdAt.toDate()
src/components/Orders.tsx:          : new Date(order.createdAt);
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const now = new Date();
src/components/Orders.tsx:        let matchesDate = true;
src/components/Orders.tsx:        if (dateFilter === "today") {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          matchesDate =
src/components/Orders.tsx:            date.getDate() === now.getDate() &&
src/components/Orders.tsx:            date.getMonth() === now.getMonth() &&
src/components/Orders.tsx:            date.getFullYear() === now.getFullYear();
src/components/Orders.tsx:        } else if (dateFilter === "month") {
src/components/Orders.tsx:          matchesDate =
src/components/Orders.tsx:            date.getMonth() === now.getMonth() &&
src/components/Orders.tsx:            date.getFullYear() === now.getFullYear();
src/components/Orders.tsx:        }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:        return matchesSearch && matchesTab && matchesDate;
src/components/Orders.tsx:      })
src/components/Orders.tsx:      .sort((a, b) => {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const dateA = a.createdAt?.toDate
src/components/Orders.tsx:          ? a.createdAt.toDate()
src/components/Orders.tsx:          : new Date(a.createdAt);
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const dateB = b.createdAt?.toDate
src/components/Orders.tsx:          ? b.createdAt.toDate()
src/components/Orders.tsx:          : new Date(b.createdAt);
src/components/Orders.tsx:        return dateB.getTime() - dateA.getTime();
src/components/Orders.tsx:      });
src/components/Orders.tsx:  }, [combinedOrders, searchTerm, activeTab, dateFilter]);
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:  const totalPages = Math.ceil(filteredOrders.length / itemsPerPage);

src/components/Orders.tsx:        }
src/components/Orders.tsx:        return true;
src/components/Orders.tsx:      }),

src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:  const getStats = useCallback(
src/components/Orders.tsx:    (statusFilter?: string) => {
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const filterFn = (o: any) => !statusFilter || o.status === statusFilter;
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const currentOrders = allO.filter(filterFn);
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const count = currentOrders.length;
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      // Using simple formatting for revenue (rounded to nearest int)
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const revenueValue = currentOrders.reduce(
src/components/Orders.tsx:        (sum, o) =>
src/components/Orders.tsx:          sum + (parseFloat(o.totalAmount) || parseFloat(o.subtotal) || 0),
src/components/Orders.tsx:        0,
src/components/Orders.tsx:      );
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const revenue = new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US").format(
src/components/Orders.tsx:        Math.round(revenueValue),
src/components/Orders.tsx:      );
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const now = new Date();
src/components/Orders.tsx:      let prevStart = new Date(0);
src/components/Orders.tsx:      let prevEnd = new Date(0);
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      if (dateFilter === "today") {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        prevStart = new Date(
src/components/Orders.tsx:          now.getFullYear(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:          now.getMonth(),
src/components/Orders.tsx:          now.getDate() - 1,
src/components/Orders.tsx:        );
src/components/Orders.tsx:        prevEnd = new Date(prevStart);
src/components/Orders.tsx:        prevEnd.setDate(prevEnd.getDate() + 1);
src/components/Orders.tsx:      } else if (dateFilter === "month") {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        prevStart = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() - 1, 1);
src/components/Orders.tsx:        prevEnd = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth(), 1);
src/components/Orders.tsx:      } else {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        prevStart = new Date();
src/components/Orders.tsx:        prevStart.setDate(now.getDate() - 60);
src/components/Orders.tsx:        prevEnd = new Date();
src/components/Orders.tsx:        prevEnd.setDate(now.getDate() - 30);
src/components/Orders.tsx:      }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      const previousPeriodCount = combinedOrders.filter((o) => {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        if (!filterFn(o)) return false;
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const d = o.createdAt?.toDate
src/components/Orders.tsx:          ? o.createdAt.toDate()
src/components/Orders.tsx:          : new Date(o.createdAt);
src/components/Orders.tsx:        return d >= prevStart && d < prevEnd;
src/components/Orders.tsx:      }).length;
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      let growthValueStr = "";
src/components/Orders.tsx:      let isPositive = true;
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      if (previousPeriodCount === 0) {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        growthValueStr = count > 0 ? "100%" : "0%";
src/components/Orders.tsx:        isPositive = count > 0;
src/components/Orders.tsx:      } else {
src/components/Orders.tsx:        const growth =
src/components/Orders.tsx:          ((count - previousPeriodCount) / previousPeriodCount) * 100;
src/components/Orders.tsx:        isPositive = growth >= 0;
src/components/Orders.tsx:        growthValueStr = Math.abs(growth).toFixed(0) + "%";
src/components/Orders.tsx:      }
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:      return { count, revenue, growth: { value: growthValueStr, isPositive } };
src/components/Orders.tsx:    },
src/components/Orders.tsx:    [allO, combinedOrders, dateFilter],
src/components/Orders.tsx:  );
src/components/Orders.tsx:
src/components/Orders.tsx:  const handleDirectPrint = useCallback(

src/components/Orders.tsx:            setPrintType(null);
src/components/Orders.tsx:          } else {

src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:interface ReconcilableOrder {

src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  orderId?: string;

src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  courier_tracking_id: string;

src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  estimated_delivery_charge?: number;
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  actual_delivery_charge?: number;
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  reconciliation_status?: 'pending' | 'matched' | 'error' | 'adjusted';
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  charge_difference?: number;
