src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:}
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:export default function CourierReconciliation() {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<ReconcilableOrder[]>([]);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  const [isProcessing, setIsProcessing] = useState(false);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  const [courierConfigs, setCourierConfigs] = useState<Record<string, any>>({});
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState<string>('all');
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    fetchCourierConfigs();
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    fetchOrders();
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  }, []);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  const fetchCourierConfigs = async () => {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    try {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      const qs = await getDocs(collection(db, 'settings'));
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      let configs = {};
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      qs.forEach(doc => {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        if (doc.id === 'couriers' || doc.id === 'courier_api') {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:          configs = doc.data();
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        }
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      });
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      setCourierConfigs(configs);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      console.error("Error fetching configs:", error);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    }
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  };
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  const fetchOrders = async () => {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    try {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      // Find orders that were sent to courier (has courier_tracking_id)
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      const q = query(
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        collection(db, 'orders'),
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        where('courier_tracking_id', '!=', null),
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        orderBy('courier_tracking_id'),
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        limit(100)
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      );
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      const snapshot = await getDocs(q);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      const fetchedOrders = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        id: doc.id,
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        ...doc.data()
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      })) as ReconcilableOrder[];
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      // Sort by creation date descending client-side since we orderBy tracking id
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      fetchedOrders.sort((a, b) => b.createdAt?.toMillis?.() - a.createdAt?.toMillis?.());
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      setOrders(fetchedOrders);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      console.error("Error fetching orders:", error);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      toast.error("Failed to load courier orders.");
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    }
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  };
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  const handleReconcileOrder = async (order: ReconcilableOrder) => {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    if (!courierConfigs) {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      toast.error("Courier configuration is missing.");
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      return;
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    }
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    setIsProcessing(true);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    try {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      const courierKey = order.courier_name.toLowerCase();
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      const config = courierConfigs[courierKey];
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      if (!config) {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        throw new Error(`API Config for ${order.courier_name} not found.`);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      }
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      const adapter = CourierFactory.getAdapter(courierKey, config);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      let actualCharge: number | null = null;
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      // Check if adapter has getDeliveryCharge directly, otherwise use trackOrder
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      if (adapter.getDeliveryCharge) {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        actualCharge = await adapter.getDeliveryCharge(order.courier_tracking_id, order);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      } else {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        const trackRes = await adapter.trackOrder(order.courier_tracking_id);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        // Try to parse typical charge fields
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        actualCharge = trackRes?.delivery_charge || 
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:                       trackRes?.charge || 
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:                       trackRes?.price || 
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:                       trackRes?.amount || 
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:                       trackRes?.data?.delivery_charge || 
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:                       trackRes?.data?.price || 
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:                       trackRes?.data?.charge || 
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:                       trackRes?.data?.charge_details?.delivery_charge ||
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:                       null;
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      }
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      if (actualCharge === null || actualCharge === undefined) {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:         throw new Error("Could not fetch charge amount from courier API.");
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      }
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      actualCharge = Number(actualCharge);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      const estimatedCharge = order.estimated_delivery_charge || order.deliveryCharge || 0;
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      const difference = actualCharge - estimatedCharge;
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      let profitAdjustment = 0;
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      if (actualCharge > estimatedCharge) {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        profitAdjustment = -(actualCharge - estimatedCharge); // Loss
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      } else if (actualCharge < estimatedCharge) {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        profitAdjustment = (estimatedCharge - actualCharge); // Extra Profit
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      }
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      const statusUpdate = difference === 0 ? 'matched' : 'adjusted';
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      // Update Order in DB
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'orders', order.id), {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        actual_delivery_charge: actualCharge,
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        charge_difference: difference,
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        delivery_profit_adjustment: profitAdjustment,
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        reconciliation_status: statusUpdate,
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        netProfit: (order.netProfit || 0) + profitAdjustment,
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        reconciledAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      });
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      toast.success(`Reconciled #${order.id} | Courier Charge: ৳${actualCharge}`);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      // Update local state
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      setOrders(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === order.id ? {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        ...o,
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        actual_delivery_charge: actualCharge as number,
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        charge_difference: difference,
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        delivery_profit_adjustment: profitAdjustment,
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        reconciliation_status: statusUpdate,
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        netProfit: (o.netProfit || 0) + profitAdjustment
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      } : o));
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    } catch (error: any) {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      console.error("Reconciliation error:", error);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      toast.error(error.message || "Reconciliation failed");
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      await updateDoc(doc(db, 'orders', order.id), {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        reconciliation_status: 'error',
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        reconciliation_error: error.message || "Unknown error"
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      });
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      setOrders(prev => prev.map(o => o.id === order.id ? {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        ...o,
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        reconciliation_status: 'error'
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      } : o));
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      setIsProcessing(false);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    }
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  };
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  const handleBulkReconcile = async () => {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    const pendings = filteredOrders.filter(o => o.reconciliation_status !== 'matched' && o.reconciliation_status !== 'adjusted');
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    if (pendings.length === 0) {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      toast.info("No pending orders to reconcile.");
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      return;
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    }
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    setIsProcessing(true);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    let successCount = 0;
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    for (const order of pendings) {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      try {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        await handleReconcileOrder(order);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        successCount++;
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      } catch (err) {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:        console.error("Failed bulk reconcile for", order.id);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      }
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    }
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    setIsProcessing(false);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    toast.success(`Bulk Reconciliation Complete. Processed ${successCount} orders.`);
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  };
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  const filteredOrders = orders.filter(order => {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    const matchesSearch = 
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      (order.orderId?.toLowerCase() || '').includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) || 
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      (order.courier_tracking_id?.toLowerCase() || '').includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase());
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    if (filterStatus === 'all') return matchesSearch;
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    if (filterStatus === 'pending') return matchesSearch && (!order.reconciliation_status || order.reconciliation_status === 'pending');
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    return matchesSearch && order.reconciliation_status === filterStatus;
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  });
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:  const getStatusBadge = (status?: string) => {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:    switch(status) {
src/components/CourierReconciliation.tsx:      case 'matched': return <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-green-50 text-green-600 rounded-full text-xs font-bold items-center flex gap-1"><CheckCircle2 size={12}/> Matched</span>;

src/components/Inventory.tsx:function ReportsTab({ products, inventory, logs }: any) {

src/components/Inventory.tsx:  const totalCost = inventory.reduce((acc: number, inv: any) => {

src/components/Inventory.tsx:    return acc + (inv.quantity * (p?.costPrice || 0));
src/components/Inventory.tsx:  }, 0);
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:  const totalRetail = inventory.reduce((acc: number, inv: any) => {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    const p = products.find((prod: any) => prod.id === inv.productId);
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    return acc + (inv.quantity * (p?.price || 0));
src/components/Inventory.tsx:  }, 0);
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:  const lowStock = inventory.filter((inv: any) => {

src/components/Inventory.tsx:    return inv.quantity <= (p?.minStock || 5);
src/components/Inventory.tsx:  });

src/components/Inventory.tsx:function AdjustmentModal({ isOpen, onClose, products, variants, warehouses }: any) {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:  const [form, setForm] = useState({ productId: '', variantId: '', warehouseId: '', quantity: 0, type: 'in', reason: '' });
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:  const handleAdjust = async () => {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    if (!form.productId || !form.warehouseId || form.quantity <= 0) {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      toast.error("Please fill all required fields with valid values.");
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      return;
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    }
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    try {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const batch = writeBatch(db);
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const adjQty = form.type === 'in' ? form.quantity : -form.quantity;
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const unitCost = products.find((p: any) => p.id === form.productId)?.costPrice || 0;
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const inventoryId = `${form.warehouseId}_${form.productId}_${form.variantId || 'none'}`;
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const inventoryRef = doc(db, 'inventory', inventoryId);
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const inventorySnap = await getDoc(inventoryRef);
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      if (inventorySnap.exists()) {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        batch.update(inventoryRef, {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          quantity: inventorySnap.data().quantity + adjQty,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        });
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      } else {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        batch.set(inventoryRef, {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          warehouseId: form.warehouseId,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          productId: form.productId,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          variantId: form.variantId || null,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          quantity: adjQty,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          uid: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        });
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      }
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const logRef = doc(collection(db, 'inventoryLogs'));
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      batch.set(logRef, {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        productId: form.productId,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        variantId: form.variantId || null,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        warehouseId: form.warehouseId,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        action: form.type === 'in' ? 'stock_in' : (form.type === 'damage' ? 'damage_out' : 'stock_out'),
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        quantityChange: adjQty,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        newQuantity: (inventorySnap.exists() ? inventorySnap.data().quantity : 0) + adjQty,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        reason: form.reason || (form.type === 'damage' ? 'Damaged / Wastage' : ''),
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        uid: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        createdAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      });
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      // Valuation Ledger
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const movementRef = doc(collection(db, 'stockLedger'));
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      batch.set(movementRef, {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        productId: form.productId,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        variantId: form.variantId || null,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        warehouseId: form.warehouseId,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        type: form.type === 'damage' ? 'damage' : 'adjustment',
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        quantity: adjQty,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        unitCost: unitCost,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        totalValue: adjQty * unitCost,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        referenceId: 'manual_adj',
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        uid: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        timestamp: serverTimestamp()
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      });
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      if (form.type === 'in') {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        const purchaseBatchRef = doc(collection(db, 'purchaseBatches'));
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        batch.set(purchaseBatchRef, {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          productId: form.productId,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          variantId: form.variantId || null,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          warehouseId: form.warehouseId,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          quantity: form.quantity,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          originalQuantity: form.quantity,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          unitCost: unitCost,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          supplierId: 'adjustment',
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          purchaseDate: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          uid: auth.currentUser?.uid
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        });
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      }
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      // If damage, record an expense in Finance
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      if (form.type === 'damage') {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        const txnRef = doc(collection(db, 'transactions'));
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        batch.set(txnRef, {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          type: 'expense',
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          category: 'Expenses',
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          subCategory: 'Damage & Wastage',
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          amount: Math.abs(adjQty) * unitCost,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          method: 'System', // Using System method
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          accountId: 'inventory_asset', // Virtual account for inventory adjustments
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          status: 'completed',
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          notes: form.reason || 'Damage/Wastage Adjustment',
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          date: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          updatedAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          uid: auth.currentUser?.uid
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        });
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      }
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      await batch.commit();
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      onClose();
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    } catch (e) {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(e, OperationType.WRITE, 'inventory');
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    }
src/components/Inventory.tsx:  };
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:  if (!isOpen) return null;
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:  const selectedProduct = products.find((p: any) => p.id === form.productId);
src/components/Inventory.tsx:  const filteredVariants = variants.filter((v: any) => v.productId === form.productId);
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:  return (
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-6">
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      <div className="bg-surface w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl shadow-2xl p-8 space-y-6">
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold font-serif text-primary">Stock Adjustment</h3>
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          <button onClick={onClose} className="p-2 hover:bg-surface-hover rounded-full"><X /></button>
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        </div>
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        <div className="space-y-4">
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          <div className="space-y-1">
src/components/Inventory.tsx:            <label className="text-[10px] font-bold text-muted uppercase">Product</label>
src/components/Inventory.tsx:            <select className="w-full p-3 bg-surface-hover rounded-xl outline-none border border-transparent focus:border-border" value={form.productId} onChange={e => setForm({...form, productId: e.target.value, variantId: ''})}>
src/components/Inventory.tsx:              <option value="">Select Product</option>
src/components/Inventory.tsx:              {products.map((p: any) => <option key={p.id} value={p.id}>{p.name}</option>)}
src/components/Inventory.tsx:            </select>
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          </div>

src/components/Inventory.tsx:            </div>
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          )}
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          <div className="space-y-1">

src/components/Inventory.tsx:function TransferModal({ isOpen, onClose, products, variants, warehouses }: any) {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:  const [form, setForm] = useState({ productId: '', variantId: '', fromWarehouseId: '', toWarehouseId: '', quantity: 0 });
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:  const handleTransfer = async () => {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    if (!form.productId || !form.fromWarehouseId || !form.toWarehouseId || form.quantity <= 0) {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      toast.error("Please fill all required fields.");
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      return;
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    }
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    if (form.fromWarehouseId === form.toWarehouseId) {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      toast.error("Source and destination warehouses must be different.");
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      return;
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    }
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    try {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const batch = writeBatch(db);
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const fromInvId = `${form.fromWarehouseId}_${form.productId}_${form.variantId || 'none'}`;
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const toInvId = `${form.toWarehouseId}_${form.productId}_${form.variantId || 'none'}`;
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const fromRef = doc(db, 'inventory', fromInvId);
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const toRef = doc(db, 'inventory', toInvId);
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const fromSnap = await getDoc(fromRef);
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const toSnap = await getDoc(toRef);
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      if (!fromSnap.exists() || fromSnap.data().quantity < form.quantity) {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        toast.error("Insufficient stock in source warehouse.");
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        return;
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      }
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      // Deduct from source
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      batch.update(fromRef, {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        quantity: fromSnap.data().quantity - form.quantity,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      });
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      // Add to destination
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      if (toSnap.exists()) {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        batch.update(toRef, {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          quantity: toSnap.data().quantity + form.quantity,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        });
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      } else {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        batch.set(toRef, {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          warehouseId: form.toWarehouseId,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          productId: form.productId,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          variantId: form.variantId || null,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          quantity: form.quantity,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          uid: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Inventory.tsx:          updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        });
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      }
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      // Log Transfer
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const logRef = doc(collection(db, 'inventoryLogs'));
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      batch.set(logRef, {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        productId: form.productId,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        variantId: form.variantId || null,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        warehouseId: form.fromWarehouseId,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        action: 'transfer_out',
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        quantityChange: -form.quantity,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        newQuantity: fromSnap.data().quantity - form.quantity,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        reason: `Transfer to ${warehouses.find((w: any) => w.id === form.toWarehouseId)?.name}`,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        uid: auth.currentUser?.uid,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        createdAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      });
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const logRef2 = doc(collection(db, 'inventoryLogs'));
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      batch.set(logRef2, {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        productId: form.productId,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        variantId: form.variantId || null,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        warehouseId: form.toWarehouseId,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        action: 'transfer_in',
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        quantityChange: form.quantity,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        newQuantity: (toSnap.exists() ? toSnap.data().quantity : 0) + form.quantity,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        reason: `Transfer from ${warehouses.find((w: any) => w.id === form.fromWarehouseId)?.name}`,

src/components/Inventory.tsx:        createdAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      });
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      await batch.commit();
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      onClose();
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    } catch (e) {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(e, OperationType.WRITE, 'inventory');

src/components/Inventory.tsx:    quantity: 1,

src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:  const handleReport = async () => {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    if (!form.productId || !form.warehouseId || form.quantity <= 0) {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      toast.error('Please fill all required fields');
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      return;
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    }
src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/components/Inventory.tsx:    try {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const batch = writeBatch(db);
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      const inventoryId = `${form.warehouseId}_${form.productId}_${form.variantId || 'none'}`;

src/components/Inventory.tsx:
src/components/Inventory.tsx:      if (!inventorySnap.exists() || inventorySnap.data().quantity < form.quantity) {
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        toast.error('Insufficient stock in selected warehouse');

src/components/Inventory.tsx:      // Update Inventory

src/components/Inventory.tsx:        updatedAt: serverTimestamp()

src/components/Inventory.tsx:        variantId: form.variantId || null,
src/components/Inventory.tsx:        warehouseId: form.warehouseId,

src/components/Inventory.tsx:        createdAt: serverTimestamp()

src/components/NewProduct.tsx:

src/components/NewProduct.tsx:          const MAX_WIDTH = 800;
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:          const MAX_HEIGHT = 800;
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:          let width = img.width;
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:          let height = img.height;
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:          if (width > height) {
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:            if (width > MAX_WIDTH) {
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:              height *= MAX_WIDTH / width;
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:              width = MAX_WIDTH;
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:            }
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:          } else {
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:            if (height > MAX_HEIGHT) {
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:              width *= MAX_HEIGHT / height;
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:              height = MAX_HEIGHT;
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:            }
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:          }
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:          canvas.width = width;
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:          canvas.height = height;
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:          ctx?.drawImage(img, 0, 0, width, height);
src/components/NewProduct.tsx:

src/components/NewProduct.tsx:          const dataUrl = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.7);

src/components/NewProduct.tsx:          setForm((prev: any) => ({

src/components/Finance.tsx:        updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/Finance.tsx:      };
src/components/Finance.tsx:      if (editingAccount) {
src/components/Finance.tsx:        await updateDoc(doc(db, 'accounts', editingAccount.id), data);
src/components/Finance.tsx:      } else {
src/components/Finance.tsx:        await addDoc(collection(db, 'accounts'), { ...data, createdAt: serverTimestamp() });
src/components/Finance.tsx:      }
src/components/Finance.tsx:      setIsAccountModalOpen(false);
src/components/Finance.tsx:    } catch (error) {

src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
src/components/Finance.tsx:    e.preventDefault();
src/components/Finance.tsx:    if (!auth.currentUser) return;
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:    try {
src/components/Finance.tsx:      const amount = Number(transactionForm.amount);
src/components/Finance.tsx:      
src/components/Finance.tsx:      await runTransaction(db, async (transaction) => {
src/components/Finance.tsx:        const accountRef = doc(db, 'accounts', transactionForm.accountId);
src/components/Finance.tsx:        const accountSnap = await transaction.get(accountRef);
src/components/Finance.tsx:        
src/components/Finance.tsx:        if (!accountSnap.exists()) {
src/components/Finance.tsx:          throw new Error("Selected account does not exist.");
src/components/Finance.tsx:        }
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:        const currentBalance = accountSnap.data().balance || 0;
src/components/Finance.tsx:        let newBalance = currentBalance;
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:        if (transactionForm.type === 'income') {
src/components/Finance.tsx:          newBalance += amount;
src/components/Finance.tsx:        } else if (transactionForm.type === 'expense') {
src/components/Finance.tsx:          newBalance -= amount;
src/components/Finance.tsx:        } else if (transactionForm.type === 'transfer') {
src/components/Finance.tsx:          // Handle transfer
src/components/Finance.tsx:          if (!transactionForm.toAccountId) throw new Error("Target account required for transfer.");
src/components/Finance.tsx:          const toAccountRef = doc(db, 'accounts', transactionForm.toAccountId);
src/components/Finance.tsx:          const toAccountSnap = await transaction.get(toAccountRef);
src/components/Finance.tsx:          if (!toAccountSnap.exists()) throw new Error("Target account does not exist.");
src/components/Finance.tsx:          
src/components/Finance.tsx:          newBalance -= amount;
src/components/Finance.tsx:          const toNewBalance = (toAccountSnap.data().balance || 0) + amount;
src/components/Finance.tsx:          transaction.update(toAccountRef, { balance: toNewBalance, updatedAt: serverTimestamp() });
src/components/Finance.tsx:        }
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:        // Update source account balance
src/components/Finance.tsx:        transaction.update(accountRef, { balance: newBalance, updatedAt: serverTimestamp() });
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:        // Add/Update transaction
src/components/Finance.tsx:        const data = {
src/components/Finance.tsx:          orderId: transactionForm.orderId,
src/components/Finance.tsx:          type: transactionForm.type,
src/components/Finance.tsx:          category: transactionForm.category,
src/components/Finance.tsx:          subCategory: transactionForm.subCategory,
src/components/Finance.tsx:          amount: amount,
src/components/Finance.tsx:          method: transactionForm.method,
src/components/Finance.tsx:          accountId: transactionForm.accountId,
src/components/Finance.tsx:          toAccountId: transactionForm.toAccountId,
src/components/Finance.tsx:          status: transactionForm.status,
src/components/Finance.tsx:          notes: transactionForm.notes,
src/components/Finance.tsx:          updatedAt: serverTimestamp()
src/components/Finance.tsx:        };
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:        if (editingTransaction) {
src/components/Finance.tsx:          // Reverse old transaction
src/components/Finance.tsx:          const oldTxnRef = doc(db, 'transactions', editingTransaction.id);
src/components/Finance.tsx:          const oldTxnSnap = await transaction.get(oldTxnRef);
src/components/Finance.tsx:          
src/components/Finance.tsx:          if (oldTxnSnap.exists()) {
src/components/Finance.tsx:            const oldTxnData = oldTxnSnap.data() as Transaction;
src/components/Finance.tsx:            
src/components/Finance.tsx:            // Reverse old account
src/components/Finance.tsx:            const oldAccountRef = doc(db, 'accounts', oldTxnData.accountId);
src/components/Finance.tsx:            const oldAccountSnap = await transaction.get(oldAccountRef);
src/components/Finance.tsx:            if (oldAccountSnap.exists()) {
src/components/Finance.tsx:              let oldBalance = oldAccountSnap.data().balance || 0;
src/components/Finance.tsx:              if (oldTxnData.type === 'income') oldBalance -= oldTxnData.amount;
src/components/Finance.tsx:              else if (oldTxnData.type === 'expense') oldBalance += oldTxnData.amount;
src/components/Finance.tsx:              else if (oldTxnData.type === 'transfer') {
src/components/Finance.tsx:                oldBalance += oldTxnData.amount;
src/components/Finance.tsx:                if (oldTxnData.toAccountId) {
src/components/Finance.tsx:                  const oldToAccountRef = doc(db, 'accounts', oldTxnData.toAccountId);
src/components/Finance.tsx:                  const oldToAccountSnap = await transaction.get(oldToAccountRef);
src/components/Finance.tsx:                  if (oldToAccountSnap.exists()) {
src/components/Finance.tsx:                    const oldToBalance = (oldToAccountSnap.data().balance || 0) - oldTxnData.amount;
src/components/Finance.tsx:                    transaction.update(oldToAccountRef, { balance: oldToBalance, updatedAt: serverTimestamp() });
src/components/Finance.tsx:                  }
src/components/Finance.tsx:                }
src/components/Finance.tsx:              }
src/components/Finance.tsx:              // We need to apply the new transaction on top of the reversed old balance
src/components/Finance.tsx:              // If the account is the same, we update newBalance
src/components/Finance.tsx:              if (oldTxnData.accountId === transactionForm.accountId) {
src/components/Finance.tsx:                newBalance = oldBalance;
src/components/Finance.tsx:                if (transactionForm.type === 'income') newBalance += amount;
src/components/Finance.tsx:                else if (transactionForm.type === 'expense') newBalance -= amount;
src/components/Finance.tsx:                else if (transactionForm.type === 'transfer') newBalance -= amount;
src/components/Finance.tsx:              } else {
src/components/Finance.tsx:                transaction.update(oldAccountRef, { balance: oldBalance, updatedAt: serverTimestamp() });
src/components/Finance.tsx:              }
src/components/Finance.tsx:            }
src/components/Finance.tsx:          }
src/components/Finance.tsx:          
src/components/Finance.tsx:          transaction.update(doc(db, 'transactions', editingTransaction.id), data);
src/components/Finance.tsx:        } else {
src/components/Finance.tsx:          const txnRef = doc(collection(db, 'transactions'));
src/components/Finance.tsx:          transaction.set(txnRef, {
src/components/Finance.tsx:            ...data,
src/components/Finance.tsx:            date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
src/components/Finance.tsx:            createdAt: serverTimestamp(),
src/components/Finance.tsx:            uid: auth.currentUser!.uid
src/components/Finance.tsx:          });
src/components/Finance.tsx:        }
src/components/Finance.tsx:      });
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:      setIsModalOpen(false);
src/components/Finance.tsx:      toast.success('Transaction recorded and account balance updated.');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/Finance.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, editingTransaction ? OperationType.UPDATE : OperationType.CREATE, 'transactions');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    }
src/components/Finance.tsx:  };

src/components/Finance.tsx:        txn.type || '',

src/components/Finance.tsx:  const totalIncome = transactions.filter(t => t.type === 'income').reduce((sum, t) => sum + (t.amount || 0), 0);
src/components/Finance.tsx:  const totalExpense = transactions.filter(t => t.type === 'expense').reduce((sum, t) => sum + (t.amount || 0), 0);
src/components/Finance.tsx:  const netProfit = totalIncome - totalExpense;
src/components/Finance.tsx:  const pendingCod = transactions.filter(t => t.status === 'Pending' && t.method === 'COD').reduce((sum, t) => sum + (t.amount || 0), 0);
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:  // Prepare chart data (last 6 months)
src/components/Finance.tsx:  const chartData = useMemo(() => {
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const months = ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'May', 'Jun', 'Jul', 'Aug', 'Sep', 'Oct', 'Nov', 'Dec'];
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const currentMonth = new Date().getMonth();
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const last6Months = [];
src/components/Finance.tsx:    
src/components/Finance.tsx:    for (let i = 5; i >= 0; i--) {
src/components/Finance.tsx:      const m = (currentMonth - i + 12) % 12;
src/components/Finance.tsx:      last6Months.push({
src/components/Finance.tsx:        name: months[m],
src/components/Finance.tsx:        income: 0,
src/components/Finance.tsx:        expense: 0,
src/components/Finance.tsx:        monthIndex: m
src/components/Finance.tsx:      });
src/components/Finance.tsx:    }
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:    transactions.forEach(txn => {
src/components/Finance.tsx:      if (!txn.createdAt) return;
src/components/Finance.tsx:      const date = txn.createdAt.toDate ? txn.createdAt.toDate() : (txn.createdAt.seconds ? new Date(txn.createdAt.seconds * 1000) : new Date(txn.createdAt));
src/components/Finance.tsx:      const month = date.getMonth();
src/components/Finance.tsx:      const chartItem = last6Months.find(item => item.monthIndex === month);
src/components/Finance.tsx:      if (chartItem) {
src/components/Finance.tsx:        if (txn.type === 'income') chartItem.income += txn.amount;
src/components/Finance.tsx:        else chartItem.expense += txn.amount;
src/components/Finance.tsx:      }
src/components/Finance.tsx:    });
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:    return last6Months;
src/components/Finance.tsx:  }, [transactions]);
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:  const pnlReport = useMemo(() => {
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const filtered = transactions.filter(txn => {
src/components/Finance.tsx:      const date = txn.createdAt?.toDate ? txn.createdAt.toDate() : (txn.createdAt?.seconds ? new Date(txn.createdAt.seconds * 1000) : new Date(txn.date));
src/components/Finance.tsx:      const start = new Date(reportRange.start);
src/components/Finance.tsx:      const end = new Date(reportRange.end);
src/components/Finance.tsx:      end.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
src/components/Finance.tsx:      return date >= start && date <= end;
src/components/Finance.tsx:    });
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const getSum = (cat: string, sub?: string) => 
src/components/Finance.tsx:      filtered.filter(t => t.category === cat && (!sub || t.subCategory === sub))
src/components/Finance.tsx:              .reduce((sum, t) => sum + (t.amount || 0), 0);
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:    // Revenue
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const productSales = getSum('Income', 'Product Sales');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const deliveryIncome = getSum('Income', 'Delivery Charge Income');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const otherIncome = getSum('Income', 'Other Income');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const discountAdjustment = getSum('Income', 'Discount Adjustment');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const totalRevenue = productSales + deliveryIncome + otherIncome - discountAdjustment;
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:    // COGS
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const productCost = getSum('COGS', 'Product Cost');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const packagingCost = getSum('COGS', 'Packaging Cost');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const deliveryCost = getSum('COGS', 'Delivery Cost');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const totalCOGS = productCost + packagingCost + deliveryCost;
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const grossProfit = totalRevenue - totalCOGS;
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:    // Expenses
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const marketing = getSum('Expenses', 'Marketing');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const salary = getSum('Expenses', 'Salary');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const rent = getSum('Expenses', 'Rent');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const utilities = getSum('Expenses', 'Utilities');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const courierCharge = getSum('Expenses', 'Courier Charge');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const miscExpenses = getSum('Expenses', 'Misc Expenses');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const totalExpenses = marketing + salary + rent + utilities + courierCharge + miscExpenses;
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const netProfit = grossProfit - totalExpenses;
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:    return {
src/components/Finance.tsx:      revenue: { productSales, deliveryIncome, otherIncome, discountAdjustment, total: totalRevenue },
src/components/Finance.tsx:      cogs: { productCost, packagingCost, deliveryCost, total: totalCOGS },
src/components/Finance.tsx:      grossProfit,
src/components/Finance.tsx:      expenses: { marketing, salary, rent, utilities, courierCharge, miscExpenses, total: totalExpenses },
src/components/Finance.tsx:      netProfit
src/components/Finance.tsx:    };
src/components/Finance.tsx:  }, [transactions, reportRange]);
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:  const balanceSheet = useMemo(() => {
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const getAccountSum = (cat: string) => accounts.filter(a => a.category === cat).reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.balance, 0);
src/components/Finance.tsx:    
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const assets = getAccountSum('Assets');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const liabilities = getAccountSum('Liabilities');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const equity = getAccountSum('Equity');
src/components/Finance.tsx:    
src/components/Finance.tsx:    // Retained Earnings is essentially the net profit from all time
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const allTimeIncome = transactions.filter(t => t.type === 'income').reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0);
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const allTimeExpense = transactions.filter(t => t.type === 'expense').reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0);
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const retainedEarnings = allTimeIncome - allTimeExpense;
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:    return {
src/components/Finance.tsx:      assets: {
src/components/Finance.tsx:        cash: accounts.filter(a => a.type === 'Cash').reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.balance, 0),
src/components/Finance.tsx:        bank: accounts.filter(a => a.type === 'Bank').reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.balance, 0),
src/components/Finance.tsx:        mobile: accounts.filter(a => a.type === 'Mobile').reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.balance, 0),
src/components/Finance.tsx:        ar: accounts.filter(a => a.name.includes('Receivable')).reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.balance, 0),
src/components/Finance.tsx:        inventory: accounts.filter(a => a.name.includes('Inventory')).reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.balance, 0),
src/components/Finance.tsx:        total: assets
src/components/Finance.tsx:      },
src/components/Finance.tsx:      liabilities: {
src/components/Finance.tsx:        ap: accounts.filter(a => a.name.includes('Payable')).reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.balance, 0),
src/components/Finance.tsx:        loans: accounts.filter(a => a.name.includes('Loan')).reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.balance, 0),
src/components/Finance.tsx:        total: liabilities
src/components/Finance.tsx:      },
src/components/Finance.tsx:      equity: {
src/components/Finance.tsx:        investment: accounts.filter(a => a.name.includes('Investment')).reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.balance, 0),
src/components/Finance.tsx:        retainedEarnings,
src/components/Finance.tsx:        withdraw: accounts.filter(a => a.name.includes('Withdraw')).reduce((sum, a) => sum + a.balance, 0),
src/components/Finance.tsx:        total: equity + retainedEarnings
src/components/Finance.tsx:      }
src/components/Finance.tsx:    };
src/components/Finance.tsx:  }, [accounts, transactions]);
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:  const cashFlow = useMemo(() => {
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const filtered = transactions.filter(txn => {
src/components/Finance.tsx:      const date = txn.createdAt?.toDate ? txn.createdAt.toDate() : (txn.createdAt?.seconds ? new Date(txn.createdAt.seconds * 1000) : new Date(txn.date));
src/components/Finance.tsx:      const start = new Date(reportRange.start);
src/components/Finance.tsx:      const end = new Date(reportRange.end);
src/components/Finance.tsx:      end.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
src/components/Finance.tsx:      return date >= start && date <= end;
src/components/Finance.tsx:    });
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const inflow = filtered.filter(t => t.type === 'income').reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0);
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const outflow = filtered.filter(t => t.type === 'expense').reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0);
src/components/Finance.tsx:    
src/components/Finance.tsx:    // Categorized Inflow
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const salesInflow = filtered.filter(t => t.type === 'income' && t.category === 'Income').reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0);
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const otherInflow = inflow - salesInflow;
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:    // Categorized Outflow
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const cogsOutflow = filtered.filter(t => t.type === 'expense' && t.category === 'COGS').reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0);
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const expenseOutflow = filtered.filter(t => t.type === 'expense' && t.category === 'Expenses').reduce((sum, t) => sum + t.amount, 0);
src/components/Finance.tsx:    const otherOutflow = outflow - cogsOutflow - expenseOutflow;
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:    return {
src/components/Finance.tsx:      inflow: { sales: salesInflow, other: otherInflow, total: inflow },
src/components/Finance.tsx:      outflow: { cogs: cogsOutflow, expenses: expenseOutflow, other: otherOutflow, total: outflow },
src/components/Finance.tsx:      netCashFlow: inflow - outflow
src/components/Finance.tsx:    };
src/components/Finance.tsx:  }, [transactions, reportRange]);

src/components/Finance.tsx:                    <span>(-) Owner Withdrawals</span>

src/components/Finance.tsx:                  </div>
src/components/Finance.tsx:                </div>
src/components/Finance.tsx:              </section>
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:              {/* Balance Check */}

src/components/Finance.tsx:                </div>
src/components/Finance.tsx:                <span className="text-3xl font-black">
src/components/Finance.tsx:                  {currencySymbol} {(balanceSheet.liabilities.total + balanceSheet.equity.total || 0).toLocaleString()}
src/components/Finance.tsx:                </span>
src/components/Finance.tsx:              </div>
src/components/Finance.tsx:              
src/components/Finance.tsx:              {Math.abs(balanceSheet.assets.total - (balanceSheet.liabilities.total + balanceSheet.equity.total)) > 1 && (
src/components/Finance.tsx:                <p className="text-center text-xs text-red-500 font-bold">⚠️ Balance Sheet is out of balance by {currencySymbol} {(Math.abs(balanceSheet.assets.total - (balanceSheet.liabilities.total + balanceSheet.equity.total)) || 0).toLocaleString()}</p>
src/components/Finance.tsx:              )}
src/components/Finance.tsx:            </div>
src/components/Finance.tsx:
src/components/Finance.tsx:            <div className="px-6 py-4 border-t border-border bg-surface-hover flex items-center justify-between">

src/components/Finance.tsx:              <button 
src/components/Finance.tsx:                onClick={() => window.print()}
src/components/Finance.tsx:                className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-slate-900 dark:bg-white text-white dark:text-black rounded-lg text-xs font-bold hover:bg-black transition-all"

src/components/Logistics.tsx:  const getCourierStatsData = useCallback((courierName: string) => {

src/components/Logistics.tsx:    const ordersSynced = courierDeliveries.length;
src/components/Logistics.tsx:    
src/components/Logistics.tsx:    // Find most recent log for this courier
src/components/Logistics.tsx:    const latestLog = courierLogs
src/components/Logistics.tsx:      .filter(log => log.courier.toLowerCase() === courierName.toLowerCase())
src/components/Logistics.tsx:      .sort((a, b) => {
src/components/Logistics.tsx:         const timeA = a.timestamp?.toMillis ? a.timestamp.toMillis() : 0;
src/components/Logistics.tsx:         const timeB = b.timestamp?.toMillis ? b.timestamp.toMillis() : 0;
src/components/Logistics.tsx:         return timeB - timeA;
src/components/Logistics.tsx:      })[0];
src/components/Logistics.tsx:    
src/components/Logistics.tsx:    let lastSyncText = '—';
src/components/Logistics.tsx:    const setSyncText = (time: Date) => {
src/components/Logistics.tsx:      const diff = Math.floor((new Date().getTime() - time.getTime()) / 60000);
src/components/Logistics.tsx:      if (diff < 1) lastSyncText = 'Just now';
src/components/Logistics.tsx:      else if (diff < 60) lastSyncText = `${diff} min ago`;
src/components/Logistics.tsx:      else if (diff < 1440) lastSyncText = `${Math.floor(diff / 60)} hrs ago`;
src/components/Logistics.tsx:      else lastSyncText = `${Math.floor(diff / 1440)} days ago`;
src/components/Logistics.tsx:    };
src/components/Logistics.tsx:
src/components/Logistics.tsx:    if (latestLog?.timestamp?.toDate) {
src/components/Logistics.tsx:      setSyncText(latestLog.timestamp.toDate());
src/components/Logistics.tsx:    } else if (courierDeliveries.length > 0) {
src/components/Logistics.tsx:      const latestDelivery = [...courierDeliveries].sort((a, b) => {
src/components/Logistics.tsx:        const timeA = a.updatedAt?.toMillis ? a.updatedAt.toMillis() : (a.createdAt?.toMillis ? a.createdAt.toMillis() : 0);
src/components/Logistics.tsx:        const timeB = b.updatedAt?.toMillis ? b.updatedAt.toMillis() : (b.createdAt?.toMillis ? b.createdAt.toMillis() : 0);
src/components/Logistics.tsx:        return timeB - timeA;
src/components/Logistics.tsx:      })[0];
src/components/Logistics.tsx:      if (latestDelivery) {
src/components/Logistics.tsx:         const time = latestDelivery.updatedAt?.toDate ? latestDelivery.updatedAt.toDate() : (latestDelivery.createdAt?.toDate ? latestDelivery.createdAt.toDate() : null);
src/components/Logistics.tsx:         if (time) setSyncText(time);
src/components/Logistics.tsx:      }
src/components/Logistics.tsx:    }
src/components/Logistics.tsx:
src/components/Logistics.tsx:    return {
src/components/Logistics.tsx:      ordersSynced: ordersSynced > 0 ? ordersSynced.toLocaleString() : '0',
src/components/Logistics.tsx:      lastSyncText
src/components/Logistics.tsx:    };
src/components/Logistics.tsx:  }, [deliveries, courierLogs]);
src/components/Logistics.tsx:

src/components/POS.tsx:  const getStock = (productId: string, variantId?: string) => {
src/components/POS.tsx:    const items = inventory.filter(i => i.productId === productId && (variantId ? i.variantId === variantId : true));
src/components/POS.tsx:    return items.reduce((acc, curr) => acc + (curr.quantity || 0), 0);
src/components/POS.tsx:  };
src/components/POS.tsx:
src/components/POS.tsx:  const addToCart = (product: any, variant?: any) => {
src/components/POS.tsx:    const stock = getStock(product.id, variant?.id);
src/components/POS.tsx:    if (stock <= 0) {
src/components/POS.tsx:      toast.error('Product out of stock');
src/components/POS.tsx:      return;
src/components/POS.tsx:    }
src/components/POS.tsx:
src/components/POS.tsx:    const cartId = variant ? `${product.id}-${variant.id}` : product.id;
src/components/POS.tsx:    const existingItem = cart.find(item => item.id === cartId);
src/components/POS.tsx:
src/components/POS.tsx:    if (existingItem) {
src/components/POS.tsx:      if (existingItem.quantity >= stock) {
src/components/POS.tsx:        toast.error('Cannot add more than available stock');
src/components/POS.tsx:        return;
src/components/POS.tsx:      }
src/components/POS.tsx:      setCart(cart.map(item => 
src/components/POS.tsx:        item.id === cartId ? { ...item, quantity: item.quantity + 1 } : item
src/components/POS.tsx:      ));
src/components/POS.tsx:    } else {
src/components/POS.tsx:      setCart([...cart, {
src/components/POS.tsx:        id: cartId,
src/components/POS.tsx:        productId: product.id,
src/components/POS.tsx:        variantId: variant?.id,
src/components/POS.tsx:        name: product.name,
src/components/POS.tsx:        variantName: variant?.name || (product.size || product.color ? `${product.size || ''} ${product.size && product.color ? '/' : ''} ${product.color || ''}`.trim() : undefined),
src/components/POS.tsx:        price: variant?.price || product.price,
src/components/POS.tsx:        quantity: 1,
src/components/POS.tsx:        stock,
src/components/POS.tsx:        image: product.images?.[0] || product.image
src/components/POS.tsx:      }]);
src/components/POS.tsx:    }
src/components/POS.tsx:  };
src/components/POS.tsx:
src/components/POS.tsx:  const updateQuantity = (id: string, delta: number) => {
src/components/POS.tsx:    setCart(cart.map(item => {
src/components/POS.tsx:      if (item.id === id) {
src/components/POS.tsx:        const newQty = Math.max(0, item.quantity + delta);
src/components/POS.tsx:        if (newQty > item.stock) {
src/components/POS.tsx:          toast.error('Cannot exceed available stock');
src/components/POS.tsx:          return item;
src/components/POS.tsx:        }
src/components/POS.tsx:        return { ...item, quantity: newQty };
src/components/POS.tsx:      }
src/components/POS.tsx:      return item;
src/components/POS.tsx:    }).filter(item => item.quantity > 0));
src/components/POS.tsx:  };
src/components/POS.tsx:
src/components/POS.tsx:  const removeFromCart = (id: string) => {
src/components/POS.tsx:    setCart(cart.filter(item => item.id !== id));
src/components/POS.tsx:  };
src/components/POS.tsx:
src/components/POS.tsx:  const subtotal = cart.reduce((acc, item) => acc + (item.price * item.quantity), 0);
src/components/POS.tsx:  const total = subtotal - discount + tax;
src/components/POS.tsx:
src/components/POS.tsx:  const handleCheckout = () => {

src/components/POS.tsx:    if (validCart.length === 0) {
src/components/POS.tsx:      toast.error('Cart is empty');

src/components/POS.tsx:    }

src/components/POS.tsx:    }

src/components/POS.tsx:      return;
src/components/POS.tsx:    }
src/components/POS.tsx:
src/components/POS.tsx:    setPaymentDetails({ last4Digits: '' });
src/components/POS.tsx:    executeCheckoutLogic();
src/components/POS.tsx:  };
src/components/POS.tsx:
src/components/POS.tsx:  const executeCheckoutLogic = async () => {
src/components/POS.tsx:    const validCart = cart.filter(item => item.quantity > 0);
src/components/POS.tsx:
src/components/POS.tsx:    setIsProcessing(true);
src/components/POS.tsx:    try {

src/components/POS.tsx:        customerName: selectedCustomer.name,
src/components/POS.tsx:        items: validCart.map(item => ({

src/components/POS.tsx:          quantity: item.quantity,

src/components/POS.tsx:          onConfirm: () => proceedWithCheckout()

src/components/POS.tsx:      }

src/components/POS.tsx:      await proceedWithCheckout();
src/components/POS.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/POS.tsx:      handleFirestoreError(error, OperationType.CREATE, 'orders');
src/components/POS.tsx:      setIsProcessing(false);
src/components/POS.tsx:    }
src/components/POS.tsx:  };
src/components/POS.tsx:

src/components/POS.tsx:        }

src/components/POS.tsx:        // 3. ALL WRITES SECOND

src/components/Dashboard.tsx:      } catch (e) {

src/components/Dashboard.tsx:      }
src/components/Dashboard.tsx:    });

src/components/Dashboard.tsx:    if (yesterdaySales > 0) {

src/components/Dashboard.tsx:    } else if (todaySales > 0) {

src/components/Reports.tsx:  useEffect(() => {

src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:  const fetchLivePerformanceData = () => {
src/components/Reports.tsx:     setLoading(true);
src/components/Reports.tsx:     const period = format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM');
src/components/Reports.tsx:     
src/components/Reports.tsx:     const unsub = onSnapshot(collection(db, 'users'), async (snapshot) => {
src/components/Reports.tsx:        try {
src/components/Reports.tsx:           const users = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() as any }));
src/components/Reports.tsx:           
src/components/Reports.tsx:           // Fetch existing performance records if any
src/components/Reports.tsx:           const dbMetrics = await PerformanceService.getPerformanceMetrics(period);
src/components/Reports.tsx:           const metricsMap = new Map();
src/components/Reports.tsx:           dbMetrics.forEach(m => metricsMap.set(m.employeeId, m));
src/components/Reports.tsx:           
src/components/Reports.tsx:           let combinedMetrics: PerformanceMetric[] = [];
src/components/Reports.tsx:           
src/components/Reports.tsx:           for (const user of users) {
src/components/Reports.tsx:              const matchedMetric = metricsMap.get(user.id);
src/components/Reports.tsx:              if (matchedMetric) {
src/components/Reports.tsx:                 combinedMetrics.push(matchedMetric);
src/components/Reports.tsx:              } else {
src/components/Reports.tsx:                 // Automatically generate a dynamic baseline record for new/existing actual users 
src/components/Reports.tsx:                 const dynamicMetrics = await PerformanceService.aggregationPerformance(user.id, new Date(), new Date());
src/components/Reports.tsx:                 // Predefine weights for simple KPI generation
src/components/Reports.tsx:                 const scoreWeights = { ordersHandled: 40, revenueGenerated: 40, customerSatisfaction: 20 };
src/components/Reports.tsx:                 
src/components/Reports.tsx:                 combinedMetrics.push({
src/components/Reports.tsx:                   id: `perf_${user.id}_${period}`,
src/components/Reports.tsx:                   employeeId: user.id,
src/components/Reports.tsx:                   employeeName: user.name || user.displayName || user.email || 'Team Member',
src/components/Reports.tsx:                   role: user.role || 'Staff',
src/components/Reports.tsx:                   period: period,
src/components/Reports.tsx:                   metrics: dynamicMetrics,
src/components/Reports.tsx:                   kpiScore: PerformanceService.calculateKPI(dynamicMetrics, scoreWeights),
src/components/Reports.tsx:                   updatedAt: new Date()
src/components/Reports.tsx:                 });
src/components/Reports.tsx:              }
src/components/Reports.tsx:           }
src/components/Reports.tsx:           
src/components/Reports.tsx:           // Apply Role Filter
src/components/Reports.tsx:           if (selectedRole !== 'All') {
src/components/Reports.tsx:             combinedMetrics = combinedMetrics.filter(m => m.role && m.role.toLowerCase() === selectedRole.toLowerCase());
src/components/Reports.tsx:           }
src/components/Reports.tsx:           
src/components/Reports.tsx:           setPerformanceData(combinedMetrics);
src/components/Reports.tsx:        } catch (err) {
src/components/Reports.tsx:           console.error("Error generating live performance data:", err);
src/components/Reports.tsx:           toast.error("Failed to load performance metrics for current team");
src/components/Reports.tsx:        } finally {
src/components/Reports.tsx:           setLoading(false);
src/components/Reports.tsx:        }
src/components/Reports.tsx:     }, (error) => {
src/components/Reports.tsx:       if (error.code !== 'permission-denied') {
src/components/Reports.tsx:         console.error("performance users listener error:", error);
src/components/Reports.tsx:       }
src/components/Reports.tsx:       setLoading(false);
src/components/Reports.tsx:     });
src/components/Reports.tsx:     
src/components/Reports.tsx:     return unsub;
src/components/Reports.tsx:  };
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:  const fetchInventoryData = async () => {
src/components/Reports.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/components/Reports.tsx:    try {
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const days = parseInt(dateRange);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const startDate = subDays(new Date(), days);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const [val, cogsValue, dead, ledgerSnap] = await Promise.all([
src/components/Reports.tsx:        ValuationService.calculateValuation(valuationMethod),
src/components/Reports.tsx:        ValuationService.calculateCOGS(startDate, new Date()),
src/components/Reports.tsx:        ValuationService.getDeadStock(days),
src/components/Reports.tsx:        getDocs(query(collection(db, 'stockLedger'), orderBy('timestamp', 'desc'), limit(50)))
src/components/Reports.tsx:      ]);
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:      setValuationData(val);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      setCogs(cogsValue);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      setDeadStock(dead);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      setStockLedger(ledgerSnap.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() })));
src/components/Reports.tsx:      
src/components/Reports.tsx:      setStats(prev => ({
src/components/Reports.tsx:        ...prev,
src/components/Reports.tsx:        inventoryValue: val.totalValuation
src/components/Reports.tsx:      }));
src/components/Reports.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/Reports.tsx:      console.error("Error fetching inventory reports:", error);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      toast.error("Failed to load inventory data");
src/components/Reports.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/Reports.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/components/Reports.tsx:    }
src/components/Reports.tsx:  };
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:  const fetchData = async () => {
src/components/Reports.tsx:    setLoading(true);
src/components/Reports.tsx:    try {
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const days = parseInt(dateRange);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const startDate = subDays(new Date(), days);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const startTimestamp = Timestamp.fromDate(startDate);
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:      // Fetch Orders
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const ordersQuery = query(
src/components/Reports.tsx:        collection(db, 'orders'),
src/components/Reports.tsx:        where('createdAt', '>=', startTimestamp),
src/components/Reports.tsx:        orderBy('createdAt', 'asc')
src/components/Reports.tsx:      );
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const ordersSnap = await getDocs(ordersQuery);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const orders = ordersSnap.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() }));
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:      // Process Sales Data for Chart
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const daysInterval = eachDayOfInterval({
src/components/Reports.tsx:        start: startDate,
src/components/Reports.tsx:        end: new Date()
src/components/Reports.tsx:      });
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const processedSales = daysInterval.map(day => {
src/components/Reports.tsx:        const dayOrders = orders.filter(o => {
src/components/Reports.tsx:          const createdAt = (o as any).createdAt?.toDate?.() || new Date((o as any).createdAt?.seconds * 1000);
src/components/Reports.tsx:          return isSameDay(createdAt, day);
src/components/Reports.tsx:        });
src/components/Reports.tsx:        const total = dayOrders.reduce((sum, o: any) => sum + (o.totalAmount || 0), 0);
src/components/Reports.tsx:        return {
src/components/Reports.tsx:          date: format(day, 'MMM dd'),
src/components/Reports.tsx:          sales: total,
src/components/Reports.tsx:          orders: dayOrders.length
src/components/Reports.tsx:        };
src/components/Reports.tsx:      });
src/components/Reports.tsx:      setSalesData(processedSales);
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:      // Top Products
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const productSales: Record<string, { name: string, sales: number, quantity: number }> = {};
src/components/Reports.tsx:      orders.forEach((order: any) => {
src/components/Reports.tsx:        if (order.items) {
src/components/Reports.tsx:          order.items.forEach((item: any) => {
src/components/Reports.tsx:            if (!productSales[item.productId]) {
src/components/Reports.tsx:              productSales[item.productId] = { name: item.name || 'Unknown', sales: 0, quantity: 0 };
src/components/Reports.tsx:            }
src/components/Reports.tsx:            productSales[item.productId].sales += (item.price * item.quantity) || 0;
src/components/Reports.tsx:            productSales[item.productId].quantity += item.quantity || 0;
src/components/Reports.tsx:          });
src/components/Reports.tsx:        }
src/components/Reports.tsx:      });
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const sortedProducts = Object.values(productSales)
src/components/Reports.tsx:        .sort((a, b) => b.sales - a.sales)
src/components/Reports.tsx:        .slice(0, 5);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      setTopProducts(sortedProducts);
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:      // Category Data
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const categorySales: Record<string, number> = {};
src/components/Reports.tsx:      orders.forEach((order: any) => {
src/components/Reports.tsx:        if (order.items) {
src/components/Reports.tsx:          order.items.forEach((item: any) => {
src/components/Reports.tsx:            const cat = item.category || 'Uncategorized';
src/components/Reports.tsx:            categorySales[cat] = (categorySales[cat] || 0) + (item.price * item.quantity || 0);
src/components/Reports.tsx:          });
src/components/Reports.tsx:        }
src/components/Reports.tsx:      });
src/components/Reports.tsx:      setCategoryData(Object.entries(categorySales).map(([name, value]) => ({ name, value })));
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:      // Source Data
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const sourceCounts: Record<string, number> = {};
src/components/Reports.tsx:      orders.forEach((order: any) => {
src/components/Reports.tsx:        const source = order.source || 'Unknown';
src/components/Reports.tsx:        sourceCounts[source] = (sourceCounts[source] || 0) + 1;
src/components/Reports.tsx:      });
src/components/Reports.tsx:      setSourceData(Object.entries(sourceCounts).map(([name, value]) => ({ name, value })));
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:      // Stats
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const totalSales = orders.reduce((sum, o: any) => sum + (o.totalAmount || 0), 0);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      
src/components/Reports.tsx:      // Fetch Orders for previous period to calculate growth
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const prevStartDate = subDays(startDate, days);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const prevOrdersQuery = query(
src/components/Reports.tsx:        collection(db, 'orders'),
src/components/Reports.tsx:        where('createdAt', '>=', Timestamp.fromDate(prevStartDate)),
src/components/Reports.tsx:        where('createdAt', '<', startTimestamp)
src/components/Reports.tsx:      );
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const prevOrdersSnap = await getDocs(prevOrdersQuery);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const prevOrders = prevOrdersSnap.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() }));
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const prevTotalSales = prevOrders.reduce((sum, o: any) => sum + (o.totalAmount || 0), 0);
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const salesGrowth = prevTotalSales > 0 ? ((totalSales - prevTotalSales) / prevTotalSales * 100) : (totalSales > 0 ? 100 : 0);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const ordersGrowth = prevOrders.length > 0 ? ((orders.length - prevOrders.length) / prevOrders.length * 100) : (orders.length > 0 ? 100 : 0);
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:      // Fetch total counts
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const customersSnap = await getDocs(collection(db, 'customers'));
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const productsSnap = await getDocs(collection(db, 'products'));
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:      setStats(prev => ({
src/components/Reports.tsx:        ...prev,
src/components/Reports.tsx:        totalSales,
src/components/Reports.tsx:        totalOrders: orders.length,
src/components/Reports.tsx:        totalCustomers: customersSnap.size,
src/components/Reports.tsx:        totalProducts: productsSnap.size,
src/components/Reports.tsx:        salesGrowth: parseFloat(salesGrowth.toFixed(1)),
src/components/Reports.tsx:        ordersGrowth: parseFloat(ordersGrowth.toFixed(1))
src/components/Reports.tsx:      }));
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/Reports.tsx:      console.error("Error fetching report data:", error);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      toast.error("Failed to load report data");
src/components/Reports.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/Reports.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/components/Reports.tsx:    }
src/components/Reports.tsx:  };
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:  const generatePDF = async () => {
src/components/Reports.tsx:    const element = document.getElementById('report-content');
src/components/Reports.tsx:    if (!element) return;
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:    toast.loading("Generating PDF report...", { id: 'pdf-gen' });
src/components/Reports.tsx:    try {
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const canvas = await html2canvas(element, {
src/components/Reports.tsx:        scale: 2,
src/components/Reports.tsx:        useCORS: true,
src/components/Reports.tsx:        logging: false
src/components/Reports.tsx:      });
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const pdf = new jsPDF('p', 'mm', 'a4');
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const imgProps = pdf.getImageProperties(imgData);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const pdfWidth = pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth();
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const pdfHeight = (imgProps.height * pdfWidth) / imgProps.width;
src/components/Reports.tsx:      
src/components/Reports.tsx:      pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      pdf.save(`SCM_Report_${format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd')}.pdf`);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      toast.success("Report downloaded successfully", { id: 'pdf-gen' });
src/components/Reports.tsx:    } catch (error) {
src/components/Reports.tsx:      console.error("PDF Error:", error);
src/components/Reports.tsx:      toast.error("Failed to generate PDF", { id: 'pdf-gen' });
src/components/Reports.tsx:    }
src/components/Reports.tsx:  };
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:  const getAIForecast = async () => {
src/components/Reports.tsx:    setIsForecasting(true);
src/components/Reports.tsx:    try {
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey: process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY! });
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const prompt = `
src/components/Reports.tsx:        As a business analyst for a Supply Chain Management system, analyze the following sales data for the last ${dateRange} days and provide a brief sales forecast and recommendations for the next 7 days.
src/components/Reports.tsx:        
src/components/Reports.tsx:        Total Sales: ${stats.totalSales}
src/components/Reports.tsx:        Total Orders: ${stats.totalOrders}
src/components/Reports.tsx:        Top Products: ${topProducts.map(p => `${p.name} (${p.quantity} units)`).join(', ')}
src/components/Reports.tsx:        
src/components/Reports.tsx:        Data Points:
src/components/Reports.tsx:        ${salesData.map(d => `${d.date}: ${d.sales}`).join('\n')}
src/components/Reports.tsx:        
src/components/Reports.tsx:        Provide the response in a professional, concise tone with bullet points for recommendations.
src/components/Reports.tsx:      `;
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:      const result = await ai.models.generateContent({
src/components/Reports.tsx:        model: "gemini-3-flash-preview",
src/components/Reports.tsx:        contents: prompt,
src/components/Reports.tsx:      });
src/components/Reports.tsx:      
src/components/Reports.tsx:      setForecasting(result.text || "No forecast generated.");
src/components/Reports.tsx:    } catch (error) {

src/components/Reports.tsx:      toast.error("Failed to get AI forecast");

src/components/Reports.tsx:      setIsForecasting(false);
src/components/Reports.tsx:    }
src/components/Reports.tsx:  };
src/components/Reports.tsx:
src/components/Reports.tsx:  if (loading) {
