src/services/valuationService.ts:  /**
src/services/valuationService.ts:   * Records a stock movement in the ledger and updates valuation batches
src/services/valuationService.ts:   */
src/services/valuationService.ts:  static async recordMovement(movement: Omit<StockLedger, 'id' | 'timestamp'>) {
src/services/valuationService.ts:    const batch = writeBatch(db);
src/services/valuationService.ts:    
src/services/valuationService.ts:    // 1. Create Ledger Entry
src/services/valuationService.ts:    const ledgerRef = doc(collection(db, 'stockLedger'));
src/services/valuationService.ts:    batch.set(ledgerRef, {
src/services/valuationService.ts:      ...movement,
src/services/valuationService.ts:      timestamp: serverTimestamp()
src/services/valuationService.ts:    });
src/services/valuationService.ts:
src/services/valuationService.ts:    // 2. Update Batches for FIFO/LIFO if it's a purchase
src/services/valuationService.ts:    if (movement.type === 'purchase') {
src/services/valuationService.ts:      const batchRef = doc(collection(db, 'purchaseBatches'));
src/services/valuationService.ts:      batch.set(batchRef, {
src/services/valuationService.ts:        productId: movement.productId,
src/services/valuationService.ts:        variantId: movement.variantId || null,
src/services/valuationService.ts:        quantity: movement.quantity,
src/services/valuationService.ts:        originalQuantity: movement.quantity,
src/services/valuationService.ts:        unitCost: movement.unitCost,
src/services/valuationService.ts:        warehouseId: movement.warehouseId,
src/services/valuationService.ts:        purchaseDate: serverTimestamp()
src/services/valuationService.ts:      });
src/services/valuationService.ts:    }
src/services/valuationService.ts:
src/services/valuationService.ts:    await batch.commit();
src/services/valuationService.ts:  }
src/services/valuationService.ts:
src/services/valuationService.ts:  /**
src/services/valuationService.ts:   * Calculates current inventory valuation using specified method
src/services/valuationService.ts:   */
src/services/valuationService.ts:  static async calculateValuation(method: ValuationMethod = 'WAC', filters?: { warehouseId?: string, category?: string }) {
src/services/valuationService.ts:    // 1. Fetch all products and variants
src/services/valuationService.ts:    const productsSnap = await getDocs(collection(db, 'products'));
src/services/valuationService.ts:    const products = productsSnap.docs.map(d => ({ id: d.id, ...d.data() } as Product));
src/services/valuationService.ts:
src/services/valuationService.ts:    // 2. Fetch all active purchase batches
src/services/valuationService.ts:    const batchesQuery = query(
src/services/valuationService.ts:      collection(db, 'purchaseBatches'),
src/services/valuationService.ts:      where('quantity', '>', 0),
src/services/valuationService.ts:      orderBy('purchaseDate', 'asc')
src/services/valuationService.ts:    );
src/services/valuationService.ts:    const batchesSnap = await getDocs(batchesQuery);
src/services/valuationService.ts:    const batches = batchesSnap.docs.map(d => ({ id: d.id, ...d.data() } as PurchaseBatch));
src/services/valuationService.ts:
src/services/valuationService.ts:    let totalValuation = 0;
src/services/valuationService.ts:    const productValuation: Record<string, { quantity: number, value: number, name: string, sku: string }> = {};
src/services/valuationService.ts:
src/services/valuationService.ts:    products.forEach(p => {
src/services/valuationService.ts:      const pBatches = batches.filter(b => b.productId === p.id);
src/services/valuationService.ts:      let quantity = 0;
src/services/valuationService.ts:      let value = 0;
src/services/valuationService.ts:
src/services/valuationService.ts:      if (method === 'WAC') {
src/services/valuationService.ts:        const totalQty = pBatches.reduce((sum, b) => sum + b.quantity, 0);
src/services/valuationService.ts:        const totalCost = pBatches.reduce((sum, b) => sum + (b.quantity * b.unitCost), 0);
src/services/valuationService.ts:        quantity = totalQty;
src/services/valuationService.ts:        value = totalCost;
src/services/valuationService.ts:      } else if (method === 'FIFO') {
src/services/valuationService.ts:        // FIFO/LIFO logic usually applies during sales to calculate COGS, 
src/services/valuationService.ts:        // but for total valuation of REMAINING stock, it's just the sum of remaining batches
src/services/valuationService.ts:        quantity = pBatches.reduce((sum, b) => sum + b.quantity, 0);
src/services/valuationService.ts:        value = pBatches.reduce((sum, b) => sum + (b.quantity * b.unitCost), 0);
src/services/valuationService.ts:      }
src/services/valuationService.ts:
src/services/valuationService.ts:      productValuation[p.id] = {
src/services/valuationService.ts:        quantity,
src/services/valuationService.ts:        value,
src/services/valuationService.ts:        name: p.name,
src/services/valuationService.ts:        sku: p.sku
src/services/valuationService.ts:      };
src/services/valuationService.ts:      totalValuation += value;
src/services/valuationService.ts:    });
src/services/valuationService.ts:
src/services/valuationService.ts:    return {
src/services/valuationService.ts:      totalValuation,
src/services/valuationService.ts:      products: productValuation
src/services/valuationService.ts:    };
src/services/valuationService.ts:  }
src/services/valuationService.ts:
src/services/valuationService.ts:  /**
src/services/valuationService.ts:   * Calculates COGS for a given period
src/services/valuationService.ts:   */
src/services/valuationService.ts:  static async calculateCOGS(startDate: Date, endDate: Date) {
src/services/valuationService.ts:    const ledgerQuery = query(
src/services/valuationService.ts:      collection(db, 'stockLedger'),
src/services/valuationService.ts:      where('type', '==', 'sale'),
src/services/valuationService.ts:      where('timestamp', '>=', Timestamp.fromDate(startDate)),
src/services/valuationService.ts:      where('timestamp', '<=', Timestamp.fromDate(endDate))
src/services/valuationService.ts:    );
src/services/valuationService.ts:    const ledgerSnap = await getDocs(ledgerQuery);
src/services/valuationService.ts:    const entries = ledgerSnap.docs.map(d => d.data() as StockLedger);
src/services/valuationService.ts:
src/services/valuationService.ts:    return entries.reduce((sum, entry) => sum + (Math.abs(entry.quantity) * entry.unitCost), 0);
src/services/valuationService.ts:  }
src/services/valuationService.ts:
src/services/valuationService.ts:  /**
src/services/valuationService.ts:   * Identifies slow moving stock (no sales in X days)
src/services/valuationService.ts:   */
src/services/valuationService.ts:  static async getDeadStock(days: number = 90) {
src/services/valuationService.ts:    const thresholdDate = subDays(new Date(), days);
src/services/valuationService.ts:    
src/services/valuationService.ts:    // Fetch all products
src/services/valuationService.ts:    const productsSnap = await getDocs(collection(db, 'products'));
src/services/valuationService.ts:    const products = productsSnap.docs.map(d => ({ id: d.id, ...d.data() } as Product));
src/services/valuationService.ts:
src/services/valuationService.ts:    // Fetch recent sales for each product
src/services/valuationService.ts:    const deadStock = [];
src/services/valuationService.ts:    for (const p of products) {
src/services/valuationService.ts:      const salesQuery = query(
src/services/valuationService.ts:        collection(db, 'stockLedger'),
src/services/valuationService.ts:        where('productId', '==', p.id),
src/services/valuationService.ts:        where('type', '==', 'sale'),
src/services/valuationService.ts:        where('timestamp', '>=', Timestamp.fromDate(thresholdDate)),
src/services/valuationService.ts:        limit(1)
src/services/valuationService.ts:      );
src/services/valuationService.ts:      const salesSnap = await getDocs(salesQuery);
src/services/valuationService.ts:      if (salesSnap.empty && p.stockLevel > 0) {
src/services/valuationService.ts:        deadStock.push(p);
src/services/valuationService.ts:      }
src/services/valuationService.ts:    }
src/services/valuationService.ts:    return deadStock;
src/services/valuationService.ts:  }
src/services/valuationService.ts:}
src/services/valuationService.ts:
src/services/valuationService.ts:function subDays(date: Date, days: number): Date {
src/services/valuationService.ts:  const result = new Date(date);
src/services/valuationService.ts:  result.setDate(result.getDate() - days);
src/services/valuationService.ts:  return result;

src/services/steadfastService.ts:
src/services/steadfastService.ts:  constructor(apiKey: string, secretKey: string) {
src/services/steadfastService.ts:    this.apiKey = (apiKey || '').trim();
src/services/steadfastService.ts:    this.secretKey = (secretKey || '').trim();
src/services/steadfastService.ts:  }
src/services/steadfastService.ts:
src/services/steadfastService.ts:  private async request(endpoint: string, method: string = 'GET', body?: any): Promise<any> {
src/services/steadfastService.ts:    if (!this.apiKey || !this.secretKey) {
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      throw new Error('Steadfast API Key or Secret Key is missing. Please configure them in Settings > Logistics.');
src/services/steadfastService.ts:    }
src/services/steadfastService.ts:
src/services/steadfastService.ts:    const url = `${this.baseUrl}${endpoint.startsWith('/') ? endpoint : '/' + endpoint}`;
src/services/steadfastService.ts:    
src/services/steadfastService.ts:    const headers: Record<string, string> = {
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      'api-key': this.apiKey,
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      'secret-key': this.secretKey,
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      'Accept': 'application/json',
src/services/steadfastService.ts:    };
src/services/steadfastService.ts:
src/services/steadfastService.ts:    if (body) {
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json';
src/services/steadfastService.ts:    }
src/services/steadfastService.ts:
src/services/steadfastService.ts:    try {
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      const response = await fetch(url, {
src/services/steadfastService.ts:        method,
src/services/steadfastService.ts:        headers,
src/services/steadfastService.ts:        body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      });
src/services/steadfastService.ts:
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      const contentType = response.headers.get('content-type');
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      let data: any;
src/services/steadfastService.ts:
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      if (contentType && contentType.includes('application/json')) {
src/services/steadfastService.ts:        data = await response.json();
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      } else {
src/services/steadfastService.ts:        const text = await response.text();
src/services/steadfastService.ts:        console.error('Steadfast API Non-JSON Response:', {
src/services/steadfastService.ts:          status: response.status,
src/services/steadfastService.ts:          statusText: response.statusText,
src/services/steadfastService.ts:          body: text.substring(0, 500)
src/services/steadfastService.ts:        });
src/services/steadfastService.ts:        
src/services/steadfastService.ts:        if (response.status === 500) {
src/services/steadfastService.ts:          throw new Error('Steadfast Server Error (500). This usually means the API keys are invalid or the account is not authorized for API access.');
src/services/steadfastService.ts:        }
src/services/steadfastService.ts:        throw new Error(`Steadfast API Error: ${response.status} ${response.statusText}`);
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      }
src/services/steadfastService.ts:
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      // Steadfast API returns status 200 in the JSON body for success.
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      // Sometimes it might return a string status or a number.
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      const status = Number(data.status);
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      if (status !== 200) {
src/services/steadfastService.ts:        console.error('Steadfast API Business Error:', data);
src/services/steadfastService.ts:        throw new Error(data.message || `Steadfast API Error (Status ${status})`);
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      }
src/services/steadfastService.ts:
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      return data;
src/services/steadfastService.ts:    } catch (error: any) {
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      console.error('Steadfast API Request Exception:', error);
src/services/steadfastService.ts:      throw error;
src/services/steadfastService.ts:    }
src/services/steadfastService.ts:  }

src/services/performanceService.ts:  static calculateKPI(metrics: any, weights: Record<string, number>): number {
src/services/performanceService.ts:    let score = 0;
src/services/performanceService.ts:    let totalWeight = 0;
src/services/performanceService.ts:
src/services/performanceService.ts:    Object.entries(weights).forEach(([key, weight]) => {

src/services/performanceService.ts:      // Normalize value to 0-100 scale based on some target (mock logic for now)
src/services/performanceService.ts:      // In production, each metric would have its own target/normalization logic
src/services/performanceService.ts:      const target = 100; 
src/services/performanceService.ts:      const normalizedValue = Math.min((value / target) * 100, 100);
src/services/performanceService.ts:      
src/services/performanceService.ts:      score += normalizedValue * (weight / 100);
src/services/performanceService.ts:      totalWeight += weight;
src/services/performanceService.ts:    });
src/services/performanceService.ts:
src/services/performanceService.ts:    return Math.round(score);
src/services/performanceService.ts:  }

src/services/orderService.ts:export interface DuplicateCheckParams {
src/services/orderService.ts:  customerPhone: string;
src/services/orderService.ts:  customerName?: string;
src/services/orderService.ts:  items: OrderItem[];
src/services/orderService.ts:  totalAmount: number;
src/services/orderService.ts:  timeWindowHours?: number; // Default to 24 hours
src/services/orderService.ts:}
src/services/orderService.ts:
src/services/orderService.ts:/**
src/services/orderService.ts: * Checks if a similar order already exists in the system within a given time window.
src/services/orderService.ts: * Returns the duplicate order if found, otherwise null.
src/services/orderService.ts: */
src/services/orderService.ts:export async function checkDuplicateOrder({
src/services/orderService.ts:  customerPhone,
src/services/orderService.ts:  customerName,
src/services/orderService.ts:  items,
src/services/orderService.ts:  totalAmount,
src/services/orderService.ts:  timeWindowHours = 24
src/services/orderService.ts:}: DuplicateCheckParams) {
src/services/orderService.ts:  try {
src/services/orderService.ts:    // Calculate the start of the time window
src/services/orderService.ts:    const timeWindowStart = new Date();
src/services/orderService.ts:    timeWindowStart.setHours(timeWindowStart.getHours() - timeWindowHours);
src/services/orderService.ts:    const startTimestamp = Timestamp.fromDate(timeWindowStart);
src/services/orderService.ts:
src/services/orderService.ts:    // Query orders for the same phone number within the time window
src/services/orderService.ts:    // We filter by phone number first as it's the primary key for duplicates
src/services/orderService.ts:    const q = query(
src/services/orderService.ts:      collection(db, 'orders'),
src/services/orderService.ts:      where('customerPhone', '==', customerPhone),
src/services/orderService.ts:      where('createdAt', '>=', startTimestamp)
src/services/orderService.ts:    );
src/services/orderService.ts:
src/services/orderService.ts:    const querySnapshot = await getDocs(q);
src/services/orderService.ts:    
src/services/orderService.ts:    if (querySnapshot.empty) {
src/services/orderService.ts:      return null;
src/services/orderService.ts:    }
src/services/orderService.ts:
src/services/orderService.ts:    // Sort items by productId and variantId for consistent comparison
src/services/orderService.ts:    const sortedNewItems = [...items].sort((a, b) => {
src/services/orderService.ts:      const idA = `${a.productId}-${a.variantId || ''}`;
src/services/orderService.ts:      const idB = `${b.productId}-${b.variantId || ''}`;
src/services/orderService.ts:      return idA.localeCompare(idB);
src/services/orderService.ts:    });
src/services/orderService.ts:
src/services/orderService.ts:    for (const doc of querySnapshot.docs) {
src/services/orderService.ts:      const existingOrder = doc.data();
src/services/orderService.ts:      
src/services/orderService.ts:      // 1. Check Order Value (Strict match)
src/services/orderService.ts:      if (Math.abs(existingOrder.totalAmount - totalAmount) > 0.01) {
src/services/orderService.ts:        continue;
src/services/orderService.ts:      }
src/services/orderService.ts:
src/services/orderService.ts:      // 2. Check Customer Name (Optional match - if provided and different, we might still consider it a duplicate if phone matches)
src/services/orderService.ts:      // The user said "Customer Name (optional match)", so we'll prioritize phone and products.
src/services/orderService.ts:      // If names are completely different, we might flag it but still consider it a duplicate if other fields match.
src/services/orderService.ts:      
src/services/orderService.ts:      // 3. Check Products / SKU
src/services/orderService.ts:      const existingItems = existingOrder.items || [];
src/services/orderService.ts:      if (existingItems.length !== items.length) {
src/services/orderService.ts:        continue;
src/services/orderService.ts:      }
src/services/orderService.ts:
src/services/orderService.ts:      const sortedExistingItems = [...existingItems].sort((a: any, b: any) => {
src/services/orderService.ts:        const idA = `${a.productId}-${a.variantId || ''}`;
src/services/orderService.ts:        const idB = `${b.productId}-${b.variantId || ''}`;
src/services/orderService.ts:        return idA.localeCompare(idB);
src/services/orderService.ts:      });
src/services/orderService.ts:
src/services/orderService.ts:      const itemsMatch = sortedNewItems.every((item, index) => {
src/services/orderService.ts:        const existingItem = sortedExistingItems[index];
src/services/orderService.ts:        return (
src/services/orderService.ts:          item.productId === existingItem.productId &&
src/services/orderService.ts:          (item.variantId || '') === (existingItem.variantId || '') &&
src/services/orderService.ts:          item.quantity === existingItem.quantity
src/services/orderService.ts:        );
src/services/orderService.ts:      });
src/services/orderService.ts:
src/services/orderService.ts:      if (itemsMatch) {
src/services/orderService.ts:        return { id: doc.id, ...existingOrder } as any;
src/services/orderService.ts:      }
src/services/orderService.ts:    }
src/services/orderService.ts:
src/services/orderService.ts:    return null;
src/services/orderService.ts:  } catch (error) {
src/services/orderService.ts:    console.error("Error checking for duplicate orders:", error);
src/services/orderService.ts:    return null;
src/services/orderService.ts:  }
src/services/orderService.ts:}

src/services/locationService.ts:    let upazila: LocationNode | undefined;
src/services/locationService.ts:    let district: LocationNode | undefined;
src/services/locationService.ts:    let division: LocationNode | undefined;
src/services/locationService.ts:
src/services/locationService.ts:    if (location.type === 'upazila') {
src/services/locationService.ts:      upazila = location;
src/services/locationService.ts:      district = districts.find(d => d.id === location.districtId);
src/services/locationService.ts:      division = divisions.find(v => v.id === location.divisionId);
src/services/locationService.ts:    } else if (location.type === 'district') {
src/services/locationService.ts:      district = location;
src/services/locationService.ts:      division = divisions.find(v => v.id === location.divisionId);
src/services/locationService.ts:    } else if (location.type === 'division') {
src/services/locationService.ts:      division = location;
src/services/locationService.ts:    }
src/services/locationService.ts:
src/services/locationService.ts:    return { upazila, district, division };
src/services/locationService.ts:  },
src/services/locationService.ts:
src/services/locationService.ts:  /**
src/services/locationService.ts:   * Smart address parsing to detect location entities from a raw string
src/services/locationService.ts:   */
src/services/locationService.ts:  parseAddress(address: string): ParsedAddress {
src/services/locationService.ts:    if (!address) return { remainingAddress: '' };
src/services/locationService.ts:
src/services/locationService.ts:    const cleanAddress = address.replace(/[^\w\s\u0980-\u09FF-]/g, ' ');
src/services/locationService.ts:    const tokens = cleanAddress.split(/\s+/).filter(t => t.length > 2);
src/services/locationService.ts:    
src/services/locationService.ts:    // Generate unigrams and bigrams
src/services/locationService.ts:    const searchTerms: string[] = [];
src/services/locationService.ts:    for(let i = 0; i < tokens.length; i++) {
src/services/locationService.ts:        searchTerms.push(tokens[i]);
src/services/locationService.ts:        if(i < tokens.length - 1) {
src/services/locationService.ts:            searchTerms.push(tokens[i] + ' ' + tokens[i+1]);
src/services/locationService.ts:        }
src/services/locationService.ts:    }
src/services/locationService.ts:
src/services/locationService.ts:    interface Match {
src/services/locationService.ts:        term: string;
src/services/locationService.ts:        item: LocationNode;
src/services/locationService.ts:        score: number;
src/services/locationService.ts:    }
src/services/locationService.ts:    const matches: Match[] = [];
src/services/locationService.ts:    
src/services/locationService.ts:    searchTerms.forEach(term => {
src/services/locationService.ts:        const termMatches = fuse.search(term);
src/services/locationService.ts:        termMatches.forEach(m => {
src/services/locationService.ts:            if(m.score !== undefined && m.score <= 0.35) {
src/services/locationService.ts:                 matches.push({
src/services/locationService.ts:                     term,
src/services/locationService.ts:                     item: m.item,
src/services/locationService.ts:                     score: m.score
src/services/locationService.ts:                 });
src/services/locationService.ts:            }
src/services/locationService.ts:        });
src/services/locationService.ts:    });
src/services/locationService.ts:
src/services/locationService.ts:    matches.sort((a, b) => {
src/services/locationService.ts:        if (Math.abs(a.score - b.score) < 0.01) {
src/services/locationService.ts:            return b.term.length - a.term.length; // prefer longer search terms for similar scores
src/services/locationService.ts:        }
src/services/locationService.ts:        return a.score - b.score;
src/services/locationService.ts:    });
src/services/locationService.ts:
src/services/locationService.ts:    let detectedDivision: LocationNode | undefined;
src/services/locationService.ts:    let detectedDistrict: LocationNode | undefined;
src/services/locationService.ts:    let detectedUpazila: LocationNode | undefined;
src/services/locationService.ts:
src/services/locationService.ts:    for (const match of matches) {
src/services/locationService.ts:      const item = match.item;
src/services/locationService.ts:      if (item.type === 'division') {
src/services/locationService.ts:        if (!detectedDivision) {
src/services/locationService.ts:             if (detectedDistrict && detectedDistrict.divisionId !== item.id) continue;
src/services/locationService.ts:             if (detectedUpazila && detectedUpazila.divisionId !== item.id) continue;
src/services/locationService.ts:             detectedDivision = item;
src/services/locationService.ts:        }
src/services/locationService.ts:      } else if (item.type === 'district') {
src/services/locationService.ts:        if (!detectedDistrict) {
src/services/locationService.ts:            if (detectedDivision && item.divisionId !== detectedDivision.id) continue;
src/services/locationService.ts:            if (detectedUpazila && detectedUpazila.districtId !== item.id) continue;
src/services/locationService.ts:            detectedDistrict = item;
src/services/locationService.ts:            if (!detectedDivision) detectedDivision = divisions.find(d => d.id === item.divisionId);
src/services/locationService.ts:        }
src/services/locationService.ts:      } else if (item.type === 'upazila' || item.type === 'area') {
src/services/locationService.ts:        if (!detectedUpazila) {
src/services/locationService.ts:            if (detectedDistrict && item.districtId !== detectedDistrict.id) continue;
src/services/locationService.ts:            if (detectedDivision && item.divisionId !== detectedDivision.id) continue;
src/services/locationService.ts:            detectedUpazila = item;
src/services/locationService.ts:            if (!detectedDistrict) detectedDistrict = districts.find(d => d.id === item.districtId);
src/services/locationService.ts:            if (!detectedDivision) detectedDivision = divisions.find(d => d.id === item.divisionId);
src/services/locationService.ts:        }
src/services/locationService.ts:      }
src/services/locationService.ts:    }
src/services/locationService.ts:
src/services/locationService.ts:    return {
src/services/locationService.ts:      division: detectedDivision,
src/services/locationService.ts:      district: detectedDistrict,
src/services/locationService.ts:      upazila: detectedUpazila,
src/services/locationService.ts:      remainingAddress: address
src/services/locationService.ts:    };
src/services/locationService.ts:  },
src/services/locationService.ts:
src/services/locationService.ts:  /**
src/services/locationService.ts:   * Map a location to a courier zone and calculate estimated delivery charge
src/services/locationService.ts:   */
src/services/locationService.ts:  getDeliveryCharge(district: string, division: string): number {
src/services/locationService.ts:    const normalizedDistrict = district.toLowerCase();
src/services/locationService.ts:    const normalizedDivision = division.toLowerCase();
src/services/locationService.ts:
src/services/locationService.ts:    if (normalizedDistrict === 'dhaka') {
src/services/locationService.ts:      return 80; // Inside Dhaka
src/services/locationService.ts:    }
src/services/locationService.ts:    
src/services/locationService.ts:    const subAreas = ['gazipur', 'narayanganj', 'savar', 'keraniganj'];
src/services/locationService.ts:    if (subAreas.includes(normalizedDistrict)) {
src/services/locationService.ts:      return 120; // Sub Area
src/services/locationService.ts:    }
src/services/locationService.ts:
src/services/locationService.ts:    return 150; // Outside Dhaka
src/services/locationService.ts:  },
src/services/locationService.ts:
src/services/locationService.ts:  /**
src/services/locationService.ts:   * Helper function to match our standard names to courier API names fuzzyly
src/services/locationService.ts:   */
src/services/locationService.ts:  matchCourierLocation(targetName: string, items: any[], nameKey: string): any {
src/services/locationService.ts:    if (!targetName || !items || items.length === 0) return null;
src/services/locationService.ts:    
src/services/locationService.ts:    // First try exact or subset match
src/services/locationService.ts:    const normalizedTarget = targetName.toLowerCase();
src/services/locationService.ts:    let exactMatch = items.find(i => i[nameKey].toLowerCase() === normalizedTarget);
src/services/locationService.ts:    if (exactMatch) return exactMatch;
src/services/locationService.ts:
src/services/locationService.ts:    // Then try fuzzy search
src/services/locationService.ts:    const fuse = new Fuse(items, {
src/services/locationService.ts:      keys: [nameKey],
src/services/locationService.ts:      threshold: 0.4,
src/services/locationService.ts:      includeScore: true,
src/services/locationService.ts:      distance: 100,
src/services/locationService.ts:    });
src/services/locationService.ts:    
src/services/locationService.ts:    const results = fuse.search(targetName);
src/services/locationService.ts:    if (results.length > 0 && results[0].score !== undefined && results[0].score <= 0.45) {
src/services/locationService.ts:      return results[0].item;
src/services/locationService.ts:    }
src/services/locationService.ts:    
src/services/locationService.ts:    // Fallback naive search
src/services/locationService.ts:    return items.find(i => 
src/services/locationService.ts:      i[nameKey].toLowerCase().includes(normalizedTarget) || 
src/services/locationService.ts:      normalizedTarget.includes(i[nameKey].toLowerCase())
src/services/locationService.ts:    );
src/services/locationService.ts:  }
src/services/locationService.ts:};

src/services/dataService.ts:const getLocalData = <T>(key: string, mock: T[]): T[] => {
src/services/dataService.ts:  try {
src/services/dataService.ts:    const stored = localStorage.getItem(key);
src/services/dataService.ts:    if (stored) return JSON.parse(stored);
src/services/dataService.ts:    localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(mock));
src/services/dataService.ts:  } catch (e) {
src/services/dataService.ts:    console.warn("localStorage access denied/failed", e);
src/services/dataService.ts:  }
src/services/dataService.ts:  return mock;
src/services/dataService.ts:};

src/services/dataService.ts:const saveLocalData = <T>(key: string, data: T[]) => {
src/services/dataService.ts:  try {
src/services/dataService.ts:    localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(data));
src/services/dataService.ts:  } catch (e) {
src/services/dataService.ts:    console.warn("localStorage access denied/failed", e);
src/services/dataService.ts:  }

src/services/dataService.ts:  subscribeOrders: (callback: (orders: Order[]) => void) => {
src/services/dataService.ts:    if (isFirebaseConfigured) {
src/services/dataService.ts:      const q = query(collection(db, 'orders'), orderBy('createdAt', 'desc'));
src/services/dataService.ts:      return onSnapshot(q, (snapshot) => {
src/services/dataService.ts:        const orders = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as Order));
src/services/dataService.ts:        callback(orders);
src/services/dataService.ts:      }, (error) => {
src/services/dataService.ts:        if (error.code !== 'permission-denied') {
src/services/dataService.ts:          console.error("Error subscribing to orders:", error);
src/services/dataService.ts:        }
src/services/dataService.ts:      });
src/services/dataService.ts:    } else {

src/lib/api.ts:export async function fetchJson(url: string, options: RequestInit = {}) {
src/lib/api.ts:  // Ensure we accept JSON, which might help proxies avoid sending HTML challenges
src/lib/api.ts:  const headers = new Headers(options.headers || {});
src/lib/api.ts:  if (!headers.has('Accept')) {
src/lib/api.ts:    headers.set('Accept', 'application/json');
src/lib/api.ts:  }
src/lib/api.ts:  
src/lib/api.ts:  const response = await fetch(url, { ...options, headers });
src/lib/api.ts:  
src/lib/api.ts:  const contentType = response.headers.get('content-type') || '';
src/lib/api.ts:  
src/lib/api.ts:  if (contentType.includes('application/json')) {
src/lib/api.ts:    return response.json();
src/lib/api.ts:  } else {
src/lib/api.ts:    const text = await response.text();
src/lib/api.ts:    // If we receive an HTML response (e.g. from a proxy Cookie check or SPA fallback)
src/lib/api.ts:    if (text.trim().startsWith('<')) {
src/lib/api.ts:      console.warn(`[API] Received HTML instead of JSON from ${url}. Proxy or auth wall might be active.`);
src/lib/api.ts:      throw new Error(`Invalid response from server. Please reload the page to refresh your session.`);
src/lib/api.ts:    }
src/lib/api.ts:    throw new Error(`Unexpected non-JSON response from server.`);
src/lib/api.ts:  }
src/lib/api.ts:}
